AI | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 3 月 31 日的三个月| | 2026 对 2025 变动 （百万美元）| 2026| | 2025| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 .............................................................| $818| | $727| | $91| | 12.5% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 456| | 451| | 5| | 1.1% 研发 .............................| 2,379| | 908| | 1,471| | 162.0% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 463| | 300| | 163| | 54.3% 重组费用 .....................................| (11)| | 4| | (15)| | NM 成本和费用合计 ...........................| $3,287| | $1,663| | $1,624| | 97.7% 经营亏损 .................................| $(2,469)| | $(936)| | $(1,533)| | 163.8% _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased by $91 million, or 12.5%, compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025 due to the increase in AI solutions and infrastructure revenue of $191 million, offset by decrease in advertising revenue of $100 million. The increase in AI solutions and infrastructure was primarily due to an increase in Grok and X subscription revenue of $177 million and an increase in data licensing arrangements of $12 million. The decrease in advertising revenue is due to an overhaul of the Company's advertising platform which impacted ad sales for a short period of time during the rebuild.
收入 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的收入较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月增加 9,100 万美元，增幅 12.5%。AI 解决方案与基础设施收入增加 1.91 亿美元，被广告收入减少 1.00 亿美元所抵消。AI 解决方案与基础设施的增长主要由 Grok 和 X 订阅收入增加 1.77 亿美元和数据许可安排增加 1,200 万美元驱动。广告收入下降的原因是公司广告平台的大修，这在重建期间对广告销售产生了短期影响。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased by $5 million, or 1.1%, compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025. This increase was primarily due to an increase in revenue share and content creator expenses of $71 million, and higher payment processing fees of $18 million, partially offset by a decrease in amortization expenses of technology intangibles of $89 million that were fully amortized during 2025.
营业成本 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的营业成本较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月增加 500 万美元，增幅 1.1%。该增长主要由收入分成和内容创作者费用增加 7,100 万美元，以及支付处理费上升 1,800 万美元驱动，部分被 2025 年内已完全摊销的技术无形资产摊销费用减少 8,900 万美元所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased by $1,471 million, or 162.0%, compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025. This increase was primarily due to higher GPU depreciation expense of $908 million, and higher cloud computing and data center infrastructure expenses of $301 million associated with the continued build out of our compute infrastructure, as well as higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) of $262 million.
研发 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的研发费用较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月增加 14.71 亿美元，增幅 162.0%。该增长主要由 GPU 折旧费用增加 9.08 亿美元、与持续建设算力基础设施相关的云计算和数据中心基础设施费用增加 3.01 亿美元，以及员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 2.62 亿美元驱动。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased by $163 million, or 54.3%, compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025. This increase was primarily due to higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) of $148 million as we continue to expand our AI business and higher legal expenses of $33 million, partially offset by a decrease in facilities and general and administrative costs of $18 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月增加 1.63 亿美元，增幅 54.3%。该增长主要由于：随着 AI 业务持续扩张，员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 1.48 亿美元，法律费用增加 3,300 万美元，部分被设施和一般及行政成本下降 1,800 万美元所抵消。
Restructuring Charges (Credits)
重组费用（抵免）
Restructuring charges (credits) for the three months ended March 31, 2026 decreased by $15 million compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025. This decrease was primarily due to a change in estimated settlement amounts for former Twitter employees as part of the workforce reduction program implemented in 2022.
截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的重组费用（抵免）较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月减少 1,500 万美元。该下降主要由于 2022 年实施的员工裁减计划下，对原 Twitter 员工预估和解金额的变动。
Loss from Operations AI loss from operations for the three months ended March 31, 2026 increased by $1,533 million, or 163.8%, compared to the prior three months ended March 31, 2025 driven by the factors described above.
经营亏损 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月的 AI 经营亏损较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日的前三个月增加 15.33 亿美元，增幅 163.8%，由上文所述因素驱动。
Comparison of the Years Ended December 31, 2025 and 2024 Consolidated Results of Operations The following table sets forth our consolidated statements of operations data for the periods indicated:
截至 2025 年和 2024 年 12 月 31 日年度的比较 合并经营成果 下表列示了所述期间的合并经营报表数据：
| | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| 2025 vs. 2024 Change (in millions)| 2025| | 2024| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $18,674| | $14,015| | $4,659| | 33.2% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 9,451| | 7,996| | 1,455| | 18.2% Research and development .............................| 8,643| | 3,464| | 5,179| | 149.5% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 2,644| | 1,813| | 831| | 45.8% Restructuring charges .....................................| 487| | 213| | 274| | 128.6% Impairment .....................................................| 38| | 63| | (25)| | (39.7)% Total costs and expenses ...........................| 21,263| | 13,549| | 7,714| | 56.9% Income (loss) from operations ............................| (2,589)| | 466| | (3,055)| | NM Interest expense ...................................................| (1,945)| | (1,580)| | (365)| | 23.1% Interest income ....................................................| 492| | 371| | 121| | 32.6% Other income, net ................................................| (177)| | 985| | (1,162)| | NM Income (loss) before income taxes ......................| (4,219)| | 242| | (4,461)| | NM Provision for (benefit from) income taxes ..........| 718| | (549)| | 1,267| | NM Net income (loss) ................................................| $(4,937)| | $791| | $(5,728)| | NM _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
| | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| 2025 对 2024 变动 （百万美元）| 2025| | 2024| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $18,674| | $14,015| | $4,659| | 33.2% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 9,451| | 7,996| | 1,455| | 18.2% 研发 .............................| 8,643| | 3,464| | 5,179| | 149.5% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 2,644| | 1,813| | 831| | 45.8% 重组费用 .....................................| 487| | 213| | 274| | 128.6% 资产减值 .....................................................| 38| | 63| | (25)| | (39.7)% 成本和费用合计 ...........................| 21,263| | 13,549| | 7,714| | 56.9% 经营利润（亏损）............................| (2,589)| | 466| | (3,055)| | NM 利息费用 ...................................................| (1,945)| | (1,580)| | (365)| | 23.1% 利息收入 ....................................................| 492| | 371| | 121| | 32.6% 其他收入净额 ................................................| (177)| | 985| | (1,162)| | NM 所得税前收入（亏损）......................| (4,219)| | 242| | (4,461)| | NM 所得税费用（收益）准备 ..........| 718| | (549)| | 1,267| | NM 净利润（亏损）................................................| $(4,937)| | $791| | $(5,728)| | NM _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $4,659 million, or 33.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to an increase in revenue from our Connectivity segment of $3,788 million as our Starlink Subscriber base continued to grow as well as our Connectivity enterprise and government sales, and increases in revenue from our Space segment of $290 million due to increases in Launch and Development revenue for work performed on government contracts, and an increase in revenue from our AI segment of $581 million as advertising, Grok and X subscriptions, and data licensing arrangements grew.
收入 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 46.59 亿美元，增幅 33.2%。该增长主要由连接分部收入增加 37.88 亿美元（Starlink 订阅用户基础持续增长以及连接业务的企业和政府销售增长）、太空分部收入增加 2.90 亿美元（政府合同执行工作带来发射与开发收入增加）、以及 AI 分部收入增加 5.81 亿美元（广告、Grok 和 X 订阅、数据许可安排增长）所驱动。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $1,455 million, or 18.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to an increase in costs in our Connectivity segment of $1,153 million driven by higher depreciation as the number of satellites placed into orbit grew and higher operating expenses, and higher infrastructure and cloud computing costs of $491 million in our AI segment, partially offset by a decrease in cost of revenue from our Space segment of $189 million due to the increased reusability of our Falcon launch vehicles resulting in lower depreciation.
营业成本 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 14.55 亿美元，增幅 18.2%。该增长主要由于：连接分部成本增加 11.53 亿美元（入轨卫星数量增加导致的折旧上升及更高的运营费用），AI 分部基础设施和云计算成本增加 4.91 亿美元，部分被太空分部营业成本下降 1.89 亿美元（由 Falcon 运载火箭可重复使用提升带来更低折旧）所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development expense for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $5,179 million, or 149.5%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher R&D costs in our AI segment of $3,888 million driven by the depreciation of GPU hardware and the cost of cloud computing as a result of our AI data center expansions and higher R&D costs from our Space segment of $1,169 million driven by accelerated investment in our Starship vehicle.
研发 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 51.79 亿美元，增幅 149.5%。该增长主要由于：AI 分部研发成本增加 38.88 亿美元（由 GPU 硬件折旧和 AI 数据中心扩张带来的云计算成本上升驱动），以及太空分部研发成本增加 11.69 亿美元（由 Starship 飞行器加速投资驱动）。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative expense for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $831 million, or 45.8%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher employee and facilities-related costs and higher legal expenses for our AI segment of $722 million as our AI business grew rapidly, and higher marketing and international expansion costs of $53 million and $37 million, respectively, for our Connectivity segment. These increases were partially offset by lower allocated general and administrative overhead in our Space segment.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 8.31 亿美元，增幅 45.8%。该增长主要由于：AI 分部因业务快速增长带来员工和设施相关成本及法律费用上升 7.22 亿美元；连接分部营销和国际扩张成本分别增加 5,300 万美元和 3,700 万美元。这些增长部分被太空分部分摊的一般及行政间接费用下降所抵消。
Restructuring Charges Restructuring charges for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $274 million, or 128.6%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to additional expense related to the settlement to former Twitter employees as part of the workforce reduction program implemented in 2022.
重组费用 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的重组费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2.74 亿美元，增幅 128.6%。该增长主要由于 2022 年实施的员工裁减计划下与原 Twitter 员工和解相关的额外费用。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $25 million, or 39.7%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. The decrease was primarily related to a discontinuation of a Starlink Kit production line in our Connectivity segment that occurred during the year ended December 31, 2024 with no impairment in 2025, partially offset by an increase in impairment in our Space Segment during the year ended December 31, 2025 primarily related to a post-landing anomaly.
资产减值 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 2,500 万美元，降幅 39.7%。该下降主要与截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日年度内连接分部 Starlink Kit 生产线停产相关（2025 年无相关减值），部分被太空分部 2025 年因着陆后异常产生的减值增加所抵消。
Income (Loss) from Operations Income (loss) from operations for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $3,055 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润（亏损） 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的经营利润（亏损）较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 30.55 亿美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Interest Expense Interest expense for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $365 million, or 23.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to new term loans and senior notes entered into by the Company and other financing arrangements for GPUs entered into during the year by our AI segment.
利息费用 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的利息费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 3.65 亿美元，增幅 23.1%。该增长主要由于公司新签订的定期贷款和优先票据，以及 AI 分部当年签订的 GPU 其他融资安排。
Interest Income Interest income for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $121 million, or 32.6%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to an increase in dividend income earned from marketable securities and cash equivalents.
利息收入 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的利息收入较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.21 亿美元，增幅 32.6%。该增长主要由于从有价证券和现金等价物获得的股息收入增加。
Other Income (Expense), Net Other income (expense), net for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $1,162 million, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This decrease was primarily due to an unrealized loss on digital assets.
其他收入（费用）净额 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的其他收入（费用）净额较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 11.62 亿美元。该下降主要由数字资产的未实现损失驱动。
Provision for (Benefit from) Income Taxes Provision for income taxes for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $1,267 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. The increase was primarily due to a partial valuation allowance release in 2024 and the establishment of a valuation allowance in 2025. For the year ended December 31, 2024, the Company released a partial valuation allowance on the Company's U.S. deferred tax assets. As of December 31, 2024, the Company forecasted $659 million of deferred tax assets related to U.S. R&D credits would be utilized in the future. For the year ended December 31, 2025, as a result of the enactment of the One Big Beautiful Bill Act (Public Law No.
所得税费用（收益）准备 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的所得税准备较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 12.67 亿美元。该增长主要由于 2024 年部分估值备抵释放以及 2025 年估值备抵的设立。截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的年度，公司释放了对美国递延所得税资产的部分估值备抵。截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日，公司预测与美国研发税收抵免相关的 6.59 亿美元递延所得税资产将在未来获得使用。截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日的年度，由于 One Big Beautiful Bill Act （第 119-21 号公法）的颁布
119-21), we assessed the realizability of our deferred tax assets and reversed the benefit that was recognized for the year ended December 31, 2024.
（公法 119-21），我们评估了递延所得税资产的可实现性，并冲回了截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日年度已确认的相关收益。
Net Income (Loss)
净利润（亏损）
Net income (loss) for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $5,728 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024 driven by the factors described above.
截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的净利润（亏损）较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 57.28 亿美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Segment Results Space | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2025 vs. 2024 Change (in millions)| 2025| | 2024| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $4,086| | $3,796| | $290| | 7.6% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 1,352| | 1,541| | (189)| | (12.2)% Research and development .............................| 3,004| | 1,835| | 1,169| | 63.7% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 349| | 375| | (26)| | (6.9)% Impairment .....................................................| 38| | 24| | 14| | 61.5% Total costs and expenses ...........................| $4,743| | $3,775| | $968| | 25.7% Income (loss) from operations ............................| $(657)| | $21| | $(678)| | NM _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
分部业绩 太空 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2025 对 2024 变动 （百万美元）| 2025| | 2024| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $4,086| | $3,796| | $290| | 7.6% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 1,352| | 1,541| | (189)| | (12.2)% 研发 .............................| 3,004| | 1,835| | 1,169| | 63.7% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 349| | 375| | (26)| | (6.9)% 资产减值 .....................................................| 38| | 24| | 14| | 61.5% 成本和费用合计 ...........................| $4,743| | $3,775| | $968| | 25.7% 经营利润（亏损）............................| $(657)| | $21| | $(678)| | NM _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $290 million, or 7.6%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. Launch Services revenue remained relatively flat year over year, while Launch and Development revenue increased by $298 million. The Launch and Development revenue increase was primarily driven by increased revenue for an extended contract with NASA for additional Cargo Resupply Services (CRS)
收入 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2.90 亿美元，增幅 7.6%。发射服务收入同比基本持平，而发射与开发收入增加 2.98 亿美元。发射与开发收入增长主要由 NASA 国际空间站额外货物补给服务 (CRS) 任务的延长合同收入增加
missions to the International Space Station and increased revenue from a U.S. Department of War contract. While total Falcon launches increased by 31 from 134 in 2024 to 165 in 2025, Space customer launches and average price per launch remained relatively flat year over year.
（续）以及来自美国国防部合同的收入增加所驱动。虽然 Falcon 总发射次数从 2024 年的 134 次增至 2025 年的 165 次（增加 31 次），但太空客户发射次数和平均单次发射价格同比基本持平。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $189 million, or 12.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This decrease was primarily due increased reusability of our Falcon launch vehicles resulting in lower deprecation of $240 million, lowering the cost of each launch, and lower overhead costs of $11 million. The decrease is also due to the relative increase in Starlink satellite launches from 89 launches in 2024 to 122 launches in 2025, resulting in relatively more of our launch operations and overhead costs capitalized in our Connectivity segment of $14 million. This decrease was partially offset by an increase in inventory excess and obsolescence reserves of $51 million mainly due to less demand on rocket vehicle and spacecraft parts as reusability has increased.
营业成本 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 1.89 亿美元，降幅 12.2%。该下降主要由于 Falcon 运载火箭可重复使用提升带来的折旧下降 2.40 亿美元（降低了每次发射成本），以及间接费用下降 1,100 万美元。该下降还由于 Starlink 卫星发射次数从 2024 年的 89 次增至 2025 年的 122 次，使我们的发射运营和间接费用中有相对更多 1,400 万美元被资本化进入连接分部。该下降部分被存货过剩与陈旧准备增加 5,100 万美元所抵消，主要由于可重复使用提升带来对火箭飞行器和航天器零部件需求减少。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $1,169 million, or 63.7%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily driven by higher production costs of $779 million, higher launch costs of $218 million, and higher engineering costs of $185 million, due to the accelerated investment in development of the Starship vehicle and continued development of production and launch facilities to support future Starship launches.
研发 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 11.69 亿美元，增幅 63.7%。该增长主要由生产成本增加 7.79 亿美元、发射成本增加 2.18 亿美元和工程成本增加 1.85 亿美元所驱动，原因是 Starship 飞行器开发的加速投资以及为支持未来 Starship 发射而持续开发生产和发射设施。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $26 million, or 6.9%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This decrease was primarily due to lower allocated general and administrative overhead of $52 million, partially offset by higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) of $16 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 2,600 万美元，降幅 6.9%。该下降主要由分摊的一般及行政间接费用下降 5,200 万美元驱动，部分被员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 1,600 万美元所抵消。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $14 million, or 61.5%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to a non-recurring impairment loss on a Falcon 9 booster due to a post-landing anomaly during the year.
资产减值 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1,400 万美元，增幅 61.5%。该增长主要由于当年一枚 Falcon 9 助推器因着陆后异常产生的非经常性减值损失。
Income (Loss) from Operations Space income from operations for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $678 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润（亏损） 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的太空经营利润较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 6.78 亿美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Connectivity | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2025 vs. 2024 Change (in millions)| 2025| | 2024| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $11,387| | $7,599| | $3,788| | 49.8% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 5,921| | 4,768| | 1,153| | 24.2% Research and development .............................| 575| | 453| | 122| | 27.1% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 468| | 333| | 135| | 40.4% Impairment .....................................................| --| | 39| | (39)| | NM Total costs and expenses ................................| $6,964| | $5,593| | $1,371| | 24.5% Income from operations ......................................| $4,423| | $2,006| | $2,417| | 120.4% _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
连接 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2025 对 2024 变动 （百万美元）| 2025| | 2024| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $11,387| | $7,599| | $3,788| | 49.8% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 5,921| | 4,768| | 1,153| | 24.2% 研发 .............................| 575| | 453| | 122| | 27.1% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 468| | 333| | 135| | 40.4% 资产减值 .....................................................| --| | 39| | (39)| | NM 成本和费用合计 ................................| $6,964| | $5,593| | $1,371| | 24.5% 经营利润 ......................................| $4,423| | $2,006| | $2,417| | 120.4% _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $3,788 million, or 49.8%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily driven by an increase of $2,377 million in revenue from our consumer subscribers, composed of 99.9% growth in Starlink Subscribers, offset by an 11.2% decline in Starlink Subscriber ARPU, primarily due to international expansion and the addition of lower priced service plans. In addition, Connectivity revenue had an increase of $1,411 million from our enterprise and government customers, primarily driven by the growth in our enterprise connectivity business of $1,218 million inclusive of growth in our mobile connectivity business of $632 million, and growth in our government connectivity business of $193 million.
收入 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 37.88 亿美元，增幅 49.8%。该增长主要由消费者订阅用户收入增加 23.77 亿美元驱动（由 Starlink 订阅用户 99.9% 的增长构成，被 Starlink 订阅用户 ARPU 11.2% 的下降所抵消，ARPU 下降主要由国际扩张和增加价格更低的服务计划造成）。此外，连接收入因企业和政府客户增加 14.11 亿美元，主要由企业连接业务增长 12.18 亿美元（其中移动连接业务增长 6.32 亿美元）和政府连接业务增长 1.93 亿美元所驱动。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $1,153 million, or 24.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher depreciation of $827 million from capitalized launch and satellite costs, higher operating expenses of $283 million mainly driven by ground operating costs of $134 million, payment processor fees of $45 million, international expansion of $44 million, warranty costs of $38 million, and employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation)
营业成本 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 11.53 亿美元，增幅 24.2%。该增长主要由资本化发射和卫星成本的折旧增加 8.27 亿美元、运营费用增加 2.83 亿美元（主要由地面运营成本 1.34 亿美元、支付处理费 4,500 万美元、国际扩张 4,400 万美元、保修成本 3,800 万美元和员工薪酬费用 1,200 万美元（包括工资、福利和股权激励）驱动），
of $12 million, and higher freight costs of $72 million.
以及运输成本增加 7,200 万美元。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $122 million, or 27.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher costs for the next-generation production development of satellites of $84 million, Starlink Kits of $22 million, and ground equipment of $15 million.
研发 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.22 亿美元，增幅 27.1%。该增长主要由下一代卫星生产开发成本增加 8,400 万美元、Starlink Kit 成本增加 2,200 万美元、地面设备成本增加 1,500 万美元所驱动。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $135 million, or 40.4%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily driven by higher marketing costs of $53 million, higher international expansion costs of $37 million, and higher allocated general and administrative overhead of $67 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.35 亿美元，增幅 40.4%。该增长主要由营销成本增加 5,300 万美元、国际扩张成本增加 3,700 万美元和分摊的一般及行政间接费用增加 6,700 万美元所驱动。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2025 decreased by $39 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. The decrease was primarily related to the discontinuation of a Starlink Kit production line in 2024 with no impairment in 2025.
资产减值 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 3,900 万美元。该下降主要与 2024 年 Starlink Kit 生产线停产相关（2025 年无相关减值）。
Income from Operations Connectivity income from operations for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $2,417 million, or 120.4%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的连接经营利润较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 24.17 亿美元，增幅 120.4%，由上文所述因素驱动。
AI | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2025 vs. 2024 Change (in millions)| 2025| | 2024| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $3,201| | $2,620| | $581| | 22.2% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 2,178| | 1,687| | 491| | 29.1% Research and development .............................| 5,064| | 1,176| | 3,888| | 330.8% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 1,827| | 1,105| | 722| | 65.4% Restructuring charges .....................................| 487| | 213| | 274| | 129.1% Total costs and expenses ...........................| $9,556| | $4,181| | $5,375| | 128.6% Loss from operations ...........................................| $(6,355)| | $(1,561)| | $(4,794)| | 307.1% _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
AI | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2025 对 2024 变动 （百万美元）| 2025| | 2024| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $3,201| | $2,620| | $581| | 22.2% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 2,178| | 1,687| | 491| | 29.1% 研发 .............................| 5,064| | 1,176| | 3,888| | 330.8% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 1,827| | 1,105| | 722| | 65.4% 重组费用 .....................................| 487| | 213| | 274| | 129.1% 成本和费用合计 ...........................| $9,556| | $4,181| | $5,375| | 128.6% 经营亏损 ...........................................| $(6,355)| | $(1,561)| | $(4,794)| | 307.1% _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $581 million, or 22.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to an increase in advertising revenue of $116 million as advertising spend increased from advertising partners on X and an increase in AI solutions and infrastructure revenue of $465 million. The increase in AI solutions and infrastructure revenue is mainly due to an increase in X and Grok subscription revenue of $365 million and an increase in revenue from data licensing arrangements of $88 million.
收入 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 5.81 亿美元，增幅 22.2%。该增长主要由广告收入增加 1.16 亿美元（X 平台上广告合作伙伴的广告支出增加）以及 AI 解决方案与基础设施收入增加 4.65 亿美元所驱动。AI 解决方案与基础设施收入的增长主要由 X 与 Grok 订阅收入增加 3.65 亿美元和数据许可安排收入增加 8,800 万美元驱动。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $491 million, or 29.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher infrastructure and cloud computing costs of $412 million attributable to increased subscriber revenue, higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) of $90 million, higher revenue share and content creator fees of $45 million, and higher payment processor fees of $28 million, partially offset by a decrease in depreciation and amortization expense of $97 million driven by a decrease in amortization expense for intangible assets that were fully amortized during 2025.
营业成本 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 4.91 亿美元，增幅 29.1%。该增长主要由订阅收入增加带来的基础设施和云计算成本增加 4.12 亿美元、员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 9,000 万美元、收入分成和内容创作者费用增加 4,500 万美元、以及支付处理费增加 2,800 万美元驱动，部分被 2025 年内已完全摊销的无形资产摊销费用减少导致的折旧和摊销费用下降 9,700 万美元所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $3,888 million, or 330.8%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher GPU depreciation expense of $1,673 million, higher infrastructure and cloud computing expenses of $1,440 million associated with the build out of our compute infrastructure, and higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) and allocated overhead costs of $775 million.
研发 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 38.88 亿美元，增幅 330.8%。该增长主要由 GPU 折旧费用增加 16.73 亿美元、与建设算力基础设施相关的基础设施和云计算费用增加 14.40 亿美元、以及员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）和分摊间接费用增加 7.75 亿美元驱动。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $722 million, or 65.4%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) of $519 million as we continue to expand our AI business, higher legal expenses of $189 million, and higher facilities and general and administrative costs of $14 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 7.22 亿美元，增幅 65.4%。该增长主要由于：随着 AI 业务持续扩张，员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 5.19 亿美元，法律费用增加 1.89 亿美元，设施和一般及行政成本增加 1,400 万美元。
Restructuring Charges Restructuring charges for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $274 million or 129.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily due to additional expense recorded to settle with former Twitter employees as part of the workforce reduction program implemented in 2022.
重组费用 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的重组费用较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2.74 亿美元，增幅 129.1%。该增长主要由于 2022 年实施的员工裁减计划下与原 Twitter 员工和解相关的额外费用。
Loss from Operations AI loss from operations for the year ended December 31, 2025 increased by $4,794 million, or 307.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2024 driven by the factors described above.
经营亏损 截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年的 AI 经营亏损较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 47.94 亿美元，增幅 307.1%，由上文所述因素驱动。
Comparison of the Years Ended December 31, 2024 and 2023 Consolidated Results of Operations | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2024 vs. 2023 Change (in millions)| 2024| | 2023| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $14,015| | $10,387| | $3,628| | 34.9% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 7,996| | 6,110| | 1,886| | 30.9% Research and development .............................| 3,464| | 2,105| | 1,359| | 64.6% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 1,813| | 1,665| | 148| | 8.9% Restructuring charges .....................................| 213| | 237| | (24)| | (10.1)% Impairment .....................................................| 63| | 3,775| | (3,712)| | (98.3)% Total costs and expenses ...........................| 13,549| | 13,892| | (343)| | (2.5)% Income (loss) from operations ............................| 466| | (3,505)| | 3,971| | NM Interest expense ...................................................| (1,580)| | (1,693)| | 113| | (6.7)% Interest income ....................................................| 371| | 249| | 122| | 49.0% Other income, net ................................................| 985| | (42)| | 1,027| | NM Income (loss) before income taxes ......................| 242| | (4,991)| | 5,233| | NM Benefit from income taxes ..................................| (549)| | (363)| | (186)| | 51.2% Net income (loss) ................................................| $791| | $(4,628)| | $5,419| | NM _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
截至 2024 年和 2023 年 12 月 31 日年度的比较 合并经营成果 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2024 对 2023 变动 （百万美元）| 2024| | 2023| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $14,015| | $10,387| | $3,628| | 34.9% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 7,996| | 6,110| | 1,886| | 30.9% 研发 .............................| 3,464| | 2,105| | 1,359| | 64.6% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 1,813| | 1,665| | 148| | 8.9% 重组费用 .....................................| 213| | 237| | (24)| | (10.1)% 资产减值 .....................................................| 63| | 3,775| | (3,712)| | (98.3)% 成本和费用合计 ...........................| 13,549| | 13,892| | (343)| | (2.5)% 经营利润（亏损）............................| 466| | (3,505)| | 3,971| | NM 利息费用 ...................................................| (1,580)| | (1,693)| | 113| | (6.7)% 利息收入 ....................................................| 371| | 249| | 122| | 49.0% 其他收入净额 ................................................| 985| | (42)| | 1,027| | NM 所得税前收入（亏损）......................| 242| | (4,991)| | 5,233| | NM 所得税收益 ..................................| (549)| | (363)| | (186)| | 51.2% 净利润（亏损）................................................| $791| | $(4,628)| | $5,419| | NM _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $3,628 million, or 34.9%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to an increase in revenue from our Connectivity segment of $3,730 million as both our Starlink consumer subscriber base continued to grow as well as our Connectivity enterprise and government sales, and an increase in revenue from our Space segment of $239 million due to the increase in Falcon 9 launches partially offset by a decrease in Launch and Development revenue due to timing of government contracts. This increase was partially offset by a decrease in revenue from our AI segment of $341 million driven by a decrease in advertising sales, partially offset by an increase in X subscriptions and data licensing arrangements.
收入 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 36.28 亿美元，增幅 34.9%。该增长主要由连接分部收入增加 37.30 亿美元（Starlink 消费者订阅用户基础持续增长以及连接业务的企业和政府销售增长），以及太空分部收入增加 2.39 亿美元（Falcon 9 发射增加，部分被政府合同时序导致的发射与开发收入下降所抵消）。该增长部分被 AI 分部收入减少 3.41 亿美元（由广告销售下降驱动，部分被 X 订阅和数据许可安排增加所抵消）所抵消。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $1,886 million, or 30.9%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to a higher cost of revenue from the Connectivity segment of $1,982 million as a result of the higher volume spend on Starlink Kits as deliveries increased and higher depreciation of launch costs driven by an increase in the number of satellites placed into orbit, partially offset by cost efficiency from increased reusability of our Falcon launch vehicles in our Space segment of $128 million.
营业成本 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 18.86 亿美元，增幅 30.9%。该增长主要由连接分部营业成本增加 19.82 亿美元（Starlink Kit 因交付增加导致更高量产支出，以及入轨卫星数量增加带来的发射成本折旧上升）所驱动，部分被太空分部因 Falcon 运载火箭可重复使用提升带来的成本效率改善 1.28 亿美元所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $1,359 million, or 64.6%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher cost in our AI segment of $990 million related to advancing our AI technologies and higher costs of $297 million in our Space segment for investment in Starship production, launch and engineering costs, and related facilities.
研发 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 13.59 亿美元，增幅 64.6%。该增长主要由 AI 分部成本增加 9.90 亿美元（与推进 AI 技术相关）和太空分部成本增加 2.97 亿美元（用于 Starship 生产、发射和工程成本以及相关设施投资）所驱动。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $148 million, or 8.9%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to: (i) higher international expansion costs of $18 million, higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share- based compensation) of $11 million, and higher allocated general and administrative overhead of $54 million in our Connectivity segment, and (ii) higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share- based compensation) and professional fees of $25 million in our Space segment.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.48 亿美元，增幅 8.9%。该增长主要由于：(i) 连接分部国际扩张成本增加 1,800 万美元、员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 1,100 万美元和分摊的一般及行政间接费用增加 5,400 万美元；(ii) 太空分部员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）和专业服务费增加 2,500 万美元。
Restructuring Charges Restructuring charges for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $24 million, or 10.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This decrease was due to the impairment on office leases assumed as part of the Twitter acquisition that occurred during the year ended December 31, 2023, partially offset by an increase in workforce-related restructuring charges.
重组费用 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的重组费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 2,400 万美元，降幅 10.1%。该下降源自截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日年度因 Twitter 收购承接的办公租约减值，部分被员工相关重组费用增加所抵消。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $3,712 million, or 98.3%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. The impairment during the year ended December 31, 2023 was primarily related to the impairment of the Twitter brand following its rebranding to X.
资产减值 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 37.12 亿美元，降幅 98.3%。截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日年度的减值主要与 Twitter 更名为 X 后对 Twitter 品牌的减值相关。
Income (Loss) from Operations Income from operations for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $3,971 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润（亏损） 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的经营利润较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 39.71 亿美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Interest Expense Interest expense for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $113 million, or 6.7%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This decrease was primarily due to the debt issuance costs related to the X Bridge Credit Facilities being amortized only through July 2024, the original maturity date, as compared to a full year of amortization in 2023.
利息费用 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的利息费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 1.13 亿美元，降幅 6.7%。该下降主要由于 X Bridge Credit Facilities 相关债务发行成本仅摊销至 2024 年 7 月（原始到期日），而 2023 年为全年摊销。
Interest Income Interest income for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $122 million, or 49.0%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to an increase in dividend income earned from marketable securities.
利息收入 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的利息收入较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.22 亿美元，增幅 49.0%。该增长主要由于从有价证券获得的股息收入增加。
Other Income (Expense), net Other income (expense), net for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $1,027 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to an unrealized gain on digital assets.
其他收入（费用）净额 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的其他收入（费用）净额较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 10.27 亿美元。该增长主要由数字资产的未实现收益驱动。
Benefit from Income Taxes Benefit from income taxes for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $186 million, or 51.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to the change in the realizability of our net deferred tax assets. As of December 31, 2024, we forecasted additional deferred tax assets related to U.S. R&D credits would be utilized.
所得税收益 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的所得税收益较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.86 亿美元，增幅 51.2%。该增长主要由于我们净递延所得税资产可实现性的变动。截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日，我们预测与美国研发税收抵免相关的额外递延所得税资产将获得使用。
Net Income (Loss)
净利润（亏损）
Net income for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $5,419 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023 driven by the factors described above.
截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的净利润较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 54.19 亿美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Space | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2024 vs. 2023 Change (in millions)| 2024| | 2023| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $3,796| | $3,557| | $239| | 6.7% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 1,541| | 1,669| | (128)| | (7.6)% Research and development .............................| 1,835| | 1,538| | 297| | 19.3% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 375| | 351| | 24| | 7.0% Impairment .....................................................| 24| | --| | 24| | NM Total costs and expenses ...........................| $3,775| | $3,558| | $217| | 6.1% Income (loss) from operations ............................| $21| | $(1)| | $22| | NM _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
太空 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2024 对 2023 变动 （百万美元）| 2024| | 2023| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $3,796| | $3,557| | $239| | 6.7% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 1,541| | 1,669| | (128)| | (7.6)% 研发 .............................| 1,835| | 1,538| | 297| | 19.3% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 375| | 351| | 24| | 7.0% 资产减值 .....................................................| 24| | --| | 24| | NM 成本和费用合计 ...........................| $3,775| | $3,558| | $217| | 6.1% 经营利润（亏损）............................| $21| | $(1)| | $22| | NM _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $239 million, or 6.7%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. Launch Services revenue increased by $620 million as total Falcon launches increased by 38 from 96 in 2023 to 134 in 2024, with Launch Services missions increasing by 8. This increase was partially offset by a decrease of $381 million for Launch and Development revenue due to decreased activity in our International Space Station contracts and lower revenue from a U.S. Department of War contract.
收入 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2.39 亿美元，增幅 6.7%。发射服务收入增加 6.20 亿美元，因 Falcon 总发射次数从 2023 年的 96 次增至 2024 年的 134 次（增加 38 次），其中发射服务任务增加 8 次。该增长部分被发射与开发收入下降 3.81 亿美元所抵消，原因是国际空间站合同活动减少以及美国国防部合同收入降低。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $128 million, or 7.6%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This decrease was primarily due to increased reusability of our Falcon launch vehicles resulting in lower depreciation of $80 million, lowering the cost of each launch. The decrease was also due to the relative increase in Starlink satellite launches from 63 launches in 2023 to 89 launches in 2024, resulting in relatively more of our launch operations and overhead costs capitalized in our Connectivity segment of $99 million.
营业成本 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 1.28 亿美元，降幅 7.6%。该下降主要由于 Falcon 运载火箭可重复使用提升带来的折旧下降 8,000 万美元（降低了每次发射成本）。该下降还由于 Starlink 卫星发射次数从 2023 年的 63 次增至 2024 年的 89 次，使我们的发射运营和间接费用中有相对更多 9,900 万美元被资本化进入连接分部。
This decrease was offset by an increase in launch overhead costs of $77 million due to the increase in Falcon launches.
该下降被发射间接成本因 Falcon 发射增加而上升的 7,700 万美元所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $297 million, or 19.3%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher production costs of $159 million, higher launch costs of $67 million, and higher engineering costs of $56 million due to the increased investment in the development of the Starship vehicle and related launch facilities.
研发 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2.97 亿美元，增幅 19.3%。该增长主要由生产成本增加 1.59 亿美元、发射成本增加 6,700 万美元和工程成本增加 5,600 万美元所驱动，原因是 Starship 飞行器及相关发射设施开发的投入增加。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $24 million, or 7.0%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share-based compensation) and professional fees of $25 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2,400 万美元，增幅 7.0%。该增长主要由员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）和专业服务费增加 2,500 万美元所驱动。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $24 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to non-recurring impairment losses resulting from one-time launch anomalies experienced during the year.
资产减值 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2,400 万美元。该增长主要由年内发生的一次性发射异常带来的非经常性减值损失所驱动。
Income (Loss) from Operations Income (loss) from operations for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $22 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润（亏损） 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的经营利润（亏损）较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2,200 万美元，由上文所述因素驱动。
Connectivity | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2024 vs. 2023 Change (in millions)| 2024| | 2023| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $7,599| | $3,869| | $3,730| | 96.4% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 4,768| | 2,786| | 1,982| | 71.1% Research and development .............................| 453| | 381| | 72| | 18.8% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 333| | 233| | 100| | 43.0% Impairment .....................................................| 39| | --| | 39| | NM Total costs and expenses ...........................| $5,593| | $3,400| | $2,193| | 64.5% Income from operations ......................................| $2,006| | $469| | $1,537| | 327.4% _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
连接 | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2024 对 2023 变动 （百万美元）| 2024| | 2023| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $7,599| | $3,869| | $3,730| | 96.4% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 4,768| | 2,786| | 1,982| | 71.1% 研发 .............................| 453| | 381| | 72| | 18.8% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 333| | 233| | 100| | 43.0% 资产减值 .....................................................| 39| | --| | 39| | NM 成本和费用合计 ................................| $5,593| | $3,400| | $2,193| | 64.5% 经营利润 ......................................| $2,006| | $469| | $1,537| | 327.4% _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $3,730 million, or 96.4%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily driven by an increase of $2,013 million in revenue from our consumer subscribers, composed of 96.5% growth in Starlink Subscribers offset by a 8.1% decline in Starlink Subscriber ARPU primarily due to international expansion. In addition, Connectivity revenue had an increase of $1,717 million from our enterprise and government customers, primarily driven by the growth in our enterprise connectivity business of $466 million and growth in our government connectivity business of $1,250 million.
收入 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 37.30 亿美元，增幅 96.4%。该增长主要由消费者订阅用户收入增加 20.13 亿美元驱动（由 Starlink 订阅用户 96.5% 的增长构成，被 Starlink 订阅用户 ARPU 8.1% 的下降所抵消，ARPU 下降主要由国际扩张造成）。此外，连接收入因企业和政府客户增加 17.17 亿美元，主要由企业连接业务增长 4.66 亿美元和政府连接业务增长 12.50 亿美元所驱动。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $1,982 million, or 71.1%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher volume spend on Starlink Kits of $907 million driven by higher kit deliveries and higher depreciation of $555 million from capitalized launch and satellite costs driven by an increase in the number of launches and satellites placed into orbit.
营业成本 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 19.82 亿美元，增幅 71.1%。该增长主要由 Starlink Kit 量产支出增加 9.07 亿美元（由更高 Kit 交付量驱动）和资本化发射和卫星成本带来的折旧增加 5.55 亿美元（由发射次数和入轨卫星数量增加驱动）所驱动。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $72 million, or 18.8%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher costs for the next-generation production development of satellites of $73 million, ground equipment of $4 million, offset by lower costs of $4 million for Starlink Kits.
研发 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 7,200 万美元，增幅 18.8%。该增长主要由下一代卫星生产开发成本增加 7,300 万美元、地面设备成本增加 400 万美元所驱动，部分被 Starlink Kit 成本下降 400 万美元所抵消。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $100 million, or 43.0%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher international expansion costs of $18 million, higher employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share- based compensation) of $11 million, and higher allocated general and administrative overhead of $54 million.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 1.00 亿美元，增幅 43.0%。该增长主要由国际扩张成本增加 1,800 万美元、员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）增加 1,100 万美元和分摊的一般及行政间接费用增加 5,400 万美元所驱动。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $39 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was due to a discontinuation of a certain Starlink Kit production line.
资产减值 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 3,900 万美元。该增长由于某条 Starlink Kit 生产线的停产。
Income from Operations Income from operations for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $1,537 million, or 327.4%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023 driven by the factors described above.
经营利润 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的经营利润较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 15.37 亿美元，增幅 327.4%，由上文所述因素驱动。
AI | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Year Ended December 31,| | 2024 vs. 2023 Change (in millions)| 2024| | 2023| | $ Change| | % Change Revenue ...............................................................| $2,620| | $2,961| | $(341)| | (11.5)% Costs and expenses| | | | | | | Cost of revenue ..............................................| 1,687| | 1,655| | 32| | 1.9% Research and development .............................| 1,176| | 186| | 990| | 531.5% Selling, general, and administrative ...............| 1,105| | 1,081| | 24| | 2.3% Restructuring charges .....................................| 213| | 237| | (24)| | (10.2)% Impairment .....................................................| --| | 3,775| | (3,775)| | NM Total costs and expenses ...........................| $4,181| | $6,934| | $(2,753)| | (39.7)% Loss from operations ...........................................| $(1,561)| | $(3,973)| | $2,412| | (60.7)% _________________ NM -- Absolute percentage comparisons from positive to negative values or to zero values are considered not meaningful.
AI | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度| | 2024 对 2023 变动 （百万美元）| 2024| | 2023| | $ 变动| | % 变动 收入 ...............................................................| $2,620| | $2,961| | $(341)| | (11.5)% 成本和费用| | | | | | | 营业成本 ..............................................| 1,687| | 1,655| | 32| | 1.9% 研发 .............................| 1,176| | 186| | 990| | 531.5% 销售、一般及行政 ...............| 1,105| | 1,081| | 24| | 2.3% 重组费用 .....................................| 213| | 237| | (24)| | (10.2)% 资产减值 .....................................................| --| | 3,775| | (3,775)| | NM 成本和费用合计 ...........................| $4,181| | $6,934| | $(2,753)| | (39.7)% 经营亏损 ...........................................| $(1,561)| | $(3,973)| | $2,412| | (60.7)% _________________ NM —— 由正值到负值或到零的绝对百分比比较被视为不具有意义。
Revenue Revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $341 million, or 11.5%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This decrease was due to a decrease in advertising revenue of $595 million, partially offset by an increase in AI solutions and infrastructure revenue of $254 million. The decrease in advertising revenue was due to the loss of advertising partners for X. The increase in AI solutions and infrastructure was due to an increase in X subscription revenue of $157 million and an increase in data licensing arrangements of $90 million. In 2023 and 2024, substantially all of our AI segment revenue consisted of advertising, subscriptions, and data licensing revenue generated from X, formerly known as Twitter.
收入 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的收入较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 3.41 亿美元，降幅 11.5%。该下降由广告收入减少 5.95 亿美元造成，部分被 AI 解决方案与基础设施收入增加 2.54 亿美元所抵消。广告收入下降的原因是 X 的广告合作伙伴流失。AI 解决方案与基础设施的增长由 X 订阅收入增加 1.57 亿美元和数据许可安排增加 9,000 万美元驱动。2023 年和 2024 年，我们 AI 分部的几乎全部收入来自 X（前身 Twitter）产生的广告、订阅和数据许可收入。
Cost of Revenue Cost of revenue for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $32 million, or 1.9%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to higher server depreciation of $97 million, partially offset by lower infrastructure and revenue share expenses of $46 million, and lower employee and facilities-related expenses of $18 million resulting from the Company's restructuring and cost reduction efforts.
营业成本 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的营业成本较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 3,200 万美元，增幅 1.9%。该增长主要由服务器折旧增加 9,700 万美元驱动，部分被基础设施和收入分成费用下降 4,600 万美元，以及公司重组和成本削减带来的员工和设施相关费用下降 1,800 万美元所抵消。
Research and Development Research and development for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $990 million, or 531.5%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to increased investments made in advancing our AI technologies, including employee compensation expenses (including salaries, benefits, and share- based compensation) and infrastructure services of $703 million and higher depreciation of $321 million for our equipment hardware.
研发 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的研发费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 9.90 亿美元，增幅 531.5%。该增长主要由对推进我们 AI 技术的投入增加驱动，包括员工薪酬费用（包括工资、福利和股权激励）和基础设施服务增加 7.03 亿美元，以及设备硬件折旧增加 3.21 亿美元。
Selling, General, and Administrative Selling, general, and administrative for the year ended December 31, 2024 increased by $24 million, or 2.3%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This increase was primarily due to an increase in our amortization expense of $107 million related to the Twitter brand becoming a finite-lived intangible asset and higher legal costs of $65 million, partially offset by lower employee and facilities related costs of $125 million and lower professional fees of $23 million resulting from the Company's restructuring and cost reduction efforts.
销售、一般及行政 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的销售、一般及行政费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度增加 2,400 万美元，增幅 2.3%。该增长主要由摊销费用增加 1.07 亿美元（与 Twitter 品牌成为有限寿命无形资产相关）和法律成本增加 6,500 万美元驱动，部分被员工和设施相关成本下降 1.25 亿美元（源自公司重组和成本削减）以及专业服务费下降 2,300 万美元所抵消。
Restructuring charges Restructuring charges for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $24 million, or 10.2%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. This decrease was due to the impairment on the office leases assumed as part of the Twitter acquisition that primarily occurred during the year ended December 31, 2023, partially offset by an increase in workforce-related restructuring charges.
重组费用 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的重组费用较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 2,400 万美元，降幅 10.2%。该下降源自截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日年度因 Twitter 收购承接的办公租约减值，部分被员工相关重组费用增加所抵消。
Impairment Impairment for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $3,775 million compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023. The impairment during the year ended December 31, 2023 was related to the impairment of the Twitter brand intangible asset following its rebranding to X.
资产减值 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的资产减值较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 37.75 亿美元。截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日年度的减值与 Twitter 更名为 X 后对 Twitter 品牌无形资产的减值相关。
Loss from Operations Loss from operations for the year ended December 31, 2024 decreased by $2,412 million, or 60.7%, compared to the prior year ended December 31, 2023 driven by the factors described above.
经营亏损 截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日全年的经营亏损较截至 2023 年 12 月 31 日的上一年度减少 24.12 亿美元，降幅 60.7%，由上文所述因素驱动。
Non-GAAP Financial Measures Management believes that certain financial measures that are not presented in accordance with GAAP provide management and investors with useful supplemental information that provides a meaningful view of our financial condition and results of operations across periods by removing the impact of items that management believes do not directly reflect our ongoing operating performance. Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA are supplemental measures that are not required by or presented in accordance with GAAP. In evaluating our performance as measured by Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA, management recognizes and considers the limitations of these measures. Other companies in our industry may calculate Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA differently than we do or may not calculate them at all, limiting their usefulness as comparative measures. Because of these limitations, Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA should not be considered in isolation or as a substitute for net income (loss), income (loss) from operations, or any other measure calculated in accordance with GAAP, and should be considered together with our GAAP financial measures and the reconciliations to the corresponding most directly comparable GAAP financial measures set forth in this prospectus.
非 GAAP 财务指标 管理层认为，某些未按 GAAP 列报的财务指标，通过剔除管理层认为不直接反映持续经营业绩的项目影响，为管理层和投资者提供了一个跨期间审视财务状况和经营成果的有意义视角的有用补充信息。调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 是补充性指标，既非 GAAP 所要求，也非按 GAAP 列报。在以调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 评估业绩时，管理层认识到并考虑这些指标的局限性。我们行业中的其他公司计算调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 的方式可能不同，或可能根本不计算这些指标，这限制了它们作为可比指标的有用性。鉴于这些局限性，调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 不应被孤立看待，也不应作为按 GAAP 计算的净利润（亏损）、经营利润（亏损）或任何其他指标的替代，且应与本招股说明书中列示的我们 GAAP 财务指标及与对应的最直接可比的 GAAP 财务指标的勾稽一起考虑。
Adjusted EBITDA is defined as net income (loss) excluding (i) depreciation and amortization, (ii) share-based compensation, (iii) impairment, (iv) restructuring charges, (v) interest expense, (vi) interest income, (vii) other income (expense), net and (viii) provision for income taxes. Segment Adjusted EBITDA is defined as segment income (loss) from operations excluding (i) depreciation and amortization, (ii) share-based compensation, (iii)
调整后 EBITDA 的定义是：净利润（亏损）扣除 (i) 折旧和摊销、(ii) 股权激励、(iii) 资产减值、(iv) 重组费用、(v) 利息费用、(vi) 利息收入、(vii) 其他收入（费用）净额和 (viii) 所得税费用。分部调整后 EBITDA 的定义是：分部经营利润（亏损）扣除 (i) 折旧和摊销、(ii) 股权激励、(iii)
restructuring charges, and (iv) impairment. Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA are key performance measures that our management uses to assess our financial performance as well as for internal planning and forecasting purposes. We consider Adjusted EBITDA and Segment Adjusted EBITDA to be meaningful performance measures for investors to evaluate our operating performance and to compare the financial results between periods.
重组费用和 (iv) 资产减值。调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 是我们管理层用于评估财务表现及用于内部规划与预测的关键业绩指标。我们认为调整后 EBITDA 和分部调整后 EBITDA 对投资者评估我们的经营业绩并比较不同期间的财务结果是有意义的业绩指标。
The following table sets forth a reconciliation of Net income (loss), the most directly comparable GAAP measure, to Adjusted EBITDA:
下表列示了与最直接可比 GAAP 指标净利润（亏损）勾稽至调整后 EBITDA 的过程：

Capital Resources Our primary sources of liquidity are cash flows generated from operations, our total cash and cash equivalents of $15,852 million as of March 31, 2026, short-term marketable securities of $7,823 million as of March 31, 2026, and borrowings under our credit facilities. As of March 31, 2026, we have $1,500 million available to borrow under the SpaceX Credit Facility. The cash we generate from our core operations also enables us to fund our research and development projects including our Starship rocket and next-generation satellites, the construction of future data centers, and the continued expansion of our AI-enabled products.

............................| 571| | 884| | 1,180| | 2,635 股权激励 ..................................| 427| | 249| | 3| | 679 重组费用 ..........................................| --| | --| | 237| | 237 资产减值 ..........................................................| --| | --| | 3,775| | 3,775 分部调整后 EBITDA ................................| $997| | $1,602| | $1,222| | $3,821 流动性与资本资源 我们流动性的主要来源是经营活动产生的现金流、截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日合计 158.52 亿美元的现金及现金等价物、截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日 78.23 亿美元的短期有价证券，以及我们信贷额度下的借款。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，我们在 SpaceX 信贷额度下有 15.00 亿美元的可借款额度。我们从核心业务产生的现金还使我们能够为研发项目（包括 Starship 火箭和下一代卫星）、未来数据中心建设以及 AI 化产品的持续扩展提供资金。
In addition, because we expect a significant portion of our future expenditures to fund growth initiatives, we retain flexibility to adjust spending across segments. For example, if our near-term data center needs decrease in scale or ramp more slowly than expected, including due to global economic, tax, trade or business conditions, we may reduce future capital expenditures in this segment and reallocate those expenditures to other segments based on business priorities and growth opportunities. In addition, we continually evaluate our cash needs and may decide it is best to raise additional capital or seek alternative financing sources to fund the rapid growth of our business, including through drawdowns on existing or new debt facilities. We may seek to refinance the SpaceX Bridge Loan, including with the proceeds from notes offerings, bank borrowings, or other financial arrangements. We may also from time to time determine that it is in our best interests to voluntarily repay certain indebtedness early.
此外，由于我们预期未来支出中很大一部分将用于为增长计划提供资金，我们保留了在各分部间调整支出的灵活性。例如，如果由于全球经济、税收、贸易或商业状况等原因，我们近期的数据中心需求在规模上下降或上行速度低于预期，我们可能减少该分部未来的资本性支出，并基于业务优先级和增长机会将其重新分配至其他分部。此外，我们持续评估现金需求，并可能决定通过从现有或新债务额度提款等方式，募集额外资本或寻求替代融资来源，以满足业务的快速增长。我们可能寻求对 SpaceX Bridge Loan 进行再融资，包括通过票据发行所得款、银行借款或其他融资安排。我们也可能不时认为提前自愿偿还某些债务符合公司最佳利益。
Accordingly, we believe we have sufficient sources of funding to meet our business requirements for at least the next twelve months from the issuance of the consolidated financial statements.
因此，我们认为我们有足够的资金来源在合并财务报表发布后至少未来十二个月内满足业务需求。
Debt Agreements SpaceX Credit Facility In February 2025, SpaceX entered into a five-year senior unsecured revolving credit agreement with a syndicate of banks, under which the Company may borrow up to $1,500 million ("SpaceX Credit Facility"). The SpaceX Credit Facility is subject to certain customary representations, warranties, covenants, and events of default, including a maximum financial covenant requiring the Company to maintain a Consolidated Leverage Ratio (as defined in the SpaceX Credit Facility) of no greater than 3.75 to 1.0 as of the end of each fiscal quarter (subject to temporary increases to 4.25 to 1.0 following certain qualified acquisitions) and other customary reporting requirements. The SpaceX Credit Facility also includes sublimits of up to $150 million for financial letters of credit and up to $1,000 million for performance letters of credit. The SpaceX Credit Facility terminates, and all outstanding loans become due and payable, on February 7, 2030, unless the parties agree to an extension in accordance with the terms of the SpaceX Credit Facility. As of March 31, 2026 and December 31, 2025, no amounts were outstanding under the SpaceX Credit Facility.
债务协议 SpaceX 信贷额度 2025 年 2 月，SpaceX 与一银行财团签订了一份为期五年的高级无担保循环信贷协议，公司可借款最多 15.00 亿美元（“SpaceX 信贷额度”）。SpaceX 信贷额度受某些惯常陈述、保证、契约和违约事件约束，包括要求公司在每个财季末维持不大于 3.75 比 1.0 的合并杠杆率（如 SpaceX 信贷额度所定义）（在某些合格收购后，临时上调至 4.25 比 1.0）的最大财务契约，以及其他惯常报告要求。SpaceX 信贷额度还包括金融信用证最高 1.50 亿美元和履约信用证最高 10.00 亿美元的子额度。SpaceX 信贷额度将于 2030 年 2 月 7 日终止，所有未偿贷款将到期应付，除非双方按 SpaceX 信贷额度条款同意延期。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日和 2025 年 12 月 31 日，SpaceX 信贷额度下没有未偿余额。
Borrowings under the SpaceX Credit Facility bear interest, at the Company's option, at a rate per annum equal to (i)
SpaceX 信贷额度下的借款，按公司选择按年利率计息：(i)
a forward-looking term rate based on SOFR ("Term SOFR") plus an applicable margin ranging from 0.75% and 1.25% (depending on the Company's debt rating), or (ii) a base rate equal to the highest of (a) Federal Funds Rate plus 0.5%, (b) the Prime Rate, (c) Term SOFR plus 1.00%, and (d) 1.00% plus an applicable margin ranging from 0.0% and 0.25% (depending on the Company's debt rating). The Company may also borrow in various alternative currencies, with interest calculated at rates based on SONIA for Pound Sterling-denominated loans and EURIBOR for Euro-denominated loans, plus an applicable margin. In addition, the Company pays a commitment fee on the unused portion of the SpaceX Credit Facility, which ranges from 0.07% (amended to 0.06% under the Amended SpaceX Credit Facility described below) to 0.11% per annum based on the Company's debt rating. As of March 31, 2026, the Company was in compliance with all covenants under the SpaceX Credit Facility.
基于 SOFR 的前瞻性定期利率（“Term SOFR”）加 0.75% 至 1.25% 的适用利差（取决于公司债务评级），或 (ii) 基础利率，等于以下四者之最高：(a) 联邦基金利率加 0.5%，(b) 优惠利率，(c) Term SOFR 加 1.00%，(d) 1.00%，加 0.0% 至 0.25% 的适用利差（取决于公司债务评级）。公司还可以以多种替代货币借款，英镑计价贷款按基于 SONIA 的利率加适用利差，欧元计价贷款按基于 EURIBOR 的利率加适用利差。此外，公司就 SpaceX 信贷额度未使用部分支付承诺费，按公司债务评级在每年 0.07%（在下述经修订 SpaceX 信贷额度下修订至 0.06%）至 0.11% 之间。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，公司遵守 SpaceX 信贷额度下的所有契约。
In March 2026, the Company entered into a First Amendment to Credit Agreement and Waiver (the "First Amendment") with its lenders, in connection with the Company's entry into the SpaceX Bridge Loan (as defined below). The First Amendment, among other things, (i) waived certain specified defaults and (ii) amended certain definitions and covenants under the SpaceX Credit Facility to conform to the terms of the SpaceX Bridge Loan.
2026 年 3 月，公司与其贷款人就公司签订 SpaceX Bridge Loan（如下文所定义）签订了《信贷协议第一次修订及豁免书》（“第一次修订”）。第一次修订除其他事项外，(i) 豁免了某些特定违约和 (ii) 修订了 SpaceX 信贷额度下的某些定义和契约，以使其与 SpaceX Bridge Loan 的条款保持一致。
In May 2026, SpaceX amended the SpaceX Credit Facility to increase the borrowing capacity up to $5,000 million ("Amended SpaceX Credit Facility"). As part of the Amended SpaceX Credit Facility, the sublimit for performance letters of credit was increased to $2,000 million. The Amended SpaceX Credit Facility terminates, and all outstanding loans become due and payable, on May 19, 2031, unless the parties agree to an extension in accordance with the terms of the Amended SpaceX Credit Facility. All other terms were consistent with the terms of the SpaceX Credit Facility.
2026 年 5 月，SpaceX 修订了 SpaceX 信贷额度，将借款额度提升至 50.00 亿美元（“经修订 SpaceX 信贷额度”）。作为经修订 SpaceX 信贷额度的一部分，履约信用证子额度提升至 20.00 亿美元。经修订 SpaceX 信贷额度将于 2031 年 5 月 19 日终止，所有未偿贷款将到期应付，除非双方按经修订 SpaceX 信贷额度条款同意延期。其他条款与 SpaceX 信贷额度的条款保持一致。
SpaceX Bridge Loan In March 2026, SpaceX entered into a new bridge loan credit agreement (the "SpaceX Bridge Loan") with a syndicate of lenders, providing for an unsecured bridge term loan facility in an aggregate principal amount of $20,000 million. The SpaceX Bridge Loan matures on September 2, 2027, with two three-month extensions at the Company's option, subject to the absence of a continuing default and the payment of an extension fee of 0.25% of the aggregate outstanding principal per extension, resulting in a final extended maturity date of March 2028.
SpaceX Bridge Loan 2026 年 3 月，SpaceX 与一贷款人财团签订了新的过桥贷款信贷协议（“SpaceX Bridge Loan”），提供了本金总额为 20,000 百万美元的无担保过桥定期贷款额度。SpaceX Bridge Loan 于 2027 年 9 月 2 日到期，公司可按其选择延期两次（每次三个月），前提是没有持续违约且支付每次延期未偿本金总额 0.25% 的延期费用，最终延期到期日为 2028 年 3 月。
The proceeds of the SpaceX Bridge Loan were used to repay the X B-1 Term Loan, the X B-3 Term Loan, the xAI Fixed Rate Loan, the xAI Floating Rate Loan and the xAI 12.5% Senior Secured Notes (as defined and described in Note 10, Debt, to the consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this prospectus). The Company may also use the remaining proceeds for general corporate purposes.
SpaceX Bridge Loan 所得款用于偿还 X B-1 定期贷款、X B-3 定期贷款、xAI 固定利率贷款、xAI 浮动利率贷款和 xAI 12.5% 高级担保票据（如本招股说明书其他部分所载合并财务报表附注 10”债务”中所定义和描述）。公司还可将剩余所得款用于一般企业用途。
The SpaceX Bridge Loan bears interest, at the Company's election, at a rate per annum equal to (i) Term SOFR plus an applicable margin ranging from 0.75%-1.75% (depending on the Company's debt rating), or (ii) a base rate equal to the highest of (a) the Federal Funds Rate plus 0.5%, (b) the Prime Rate, (c) Term SOFR plus 1.0% and (d) 1.00%, plus an applicable margin ranging from 0.00% to 0.75% (depending on the Company's debt rating). In addition, the Company is obligated to pay duration fees equal to 0.125% of outstanding principal on the first anniversary of closing and 0.25% of outstanding principal on the fifteen-month anniversary of closing. As of March 31, 2026, the Company was in compliance with all covenants under the SpaceX Bridge Loan.
SpaceX Bridge Loan 按公司选择按年利率计息：(i) Term SOFR 加 0.75%-1.75% 的适用利差（取决于公司债务评级），或 (ii) 基础利率，等于以下四者之最高：(a) 联邦基金利率加 0.5%，(b) 优惠利率，(c) Term SOFR 加 1.0%，(d) 1.00%，加 0.00% 至 0.75% 的适用利差（取决于公司债务评级）。此外，公司须在交割一周年时支付未偿本金 0.125% 的期限费，在交割十五个月时支付未偿本金 0.25% 的期限费。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，公司遵守 SpaceX Bridge Loan 下的所有契约。
The obligations of the Company under the SpaceX Bridge Loan are guaranteed on a joint and several basis by X Corp., X.AI LLC, and CTC Property LLC (each a subsidiary of the Company). The SpaceX Bridge Loan may be prepaid at any time, in whole or in part, without premium or penalty. The Company is required to use an amount equal to the net cash proceeds of certain debt financings to repay amounts outstanding under the SpaceX Bridge Loan and to apply an amount equal to the net proceeds of a qualified initial public offering, including this offering, to repay such amounts within six months following receipt of such proceeds.
公司在 SpaceX Bridge Loan 下的义务由 X Corp.、X.AI LLC 和 CTC Property LLC（均为公司子公司）共同及各别担保。SpaceX Bridge Loan 可随时全额或部分预付，无溢价或罚金。公司须用某些债务融资净现金所得相当金额偿还 SpaceX Bridge Loan 下的未偿金额，并须在收到合格首次公开发行（包括本次发行）净所得款的六个月内将与该净所得款相当的金额用于偿还此类金额。
The SpaceX Bridge Loan contains customary events of default and affirmative and negative covenants, including restrictions on liens, subsidiary indebtedness, fundamental changes (including a prohibition on the disposition of Starlink assets and other material businesses outside the consolidated group), and changes in the nature of the Company's business. The sole financial maintenance covenant requires the Company to maintain a Consolidated Leverage Ratio -- defined as consolidated funded indebtedness (net of 85% of unrestricted cash) to Consolidated EBITDA (as defined in the SpaceX Bridge Loan) -- of no greater than 3.75 to 1.0 as of the end of each fiscal quarter, with a temporary step-up to 4.25 to 1.0 for four fiscal quarters following a qualifying acquisition of at least $1.0 billion.
SpaceX Bridge Loan 包含惯常的违约事件以及肯定性和否定性契约，包括对留置权、子公司债务、根本性变更（包括禁止处置 Starlink 资产以及合并集团以外的其他重要业务）和公司业务性质变更的限制。唯一的财务维持性契约要求公司在每个财季末将合并杠杆率（定义为合并融资性债务（扣除 85% 非受限现金）与合并 EBITDA（如 SpaceX Bridge Loan 中所定义）之比）维持在不大于 3.75 比 1.0，并在不少于 10 亿美元的合格收购后四个财季内临时上调至 4.25 比 1.0。
Material Cash Commitments From time to time in the ordinary course of business, we enter into agreements with suppliers for the purchase of parts and raw materials to manufacture our products. However, due to contractual terms, variability in the precise growth curves of our development and production ramps, and opportunities to renegotiate pricing, these contracts generally do not have long-term binding and enforceable purchase orders, and the timing and magnitude of purchase orders beyond the short term is difficult to accurately project. Because we do not have long-term purchase orders for these parts and raw materials, future purchases may result in material cash commitments. For additional information about this risk, please refer to "Risk Factors" in this prospectus.
重大现金承诺 我们在日常业务过程中不时与供应商签订协议，购买零部件和原材料以制造产品。然而，由于合同条款、我们开发和生产爬坡精确增长曲线的多变性以及重新协商定价的机会，这些合同通常没有长期约束力和可强制执行的采购订单，且短期之外的采购订单时序和数量难以准确预测。由于我们对这些零部件和原材料没有长期采购订单，未来采购可能导致重大现金承诺。关于该风险的更多信息，请参阅本招股说明书”风险因素”。
On September 7, 2025, the Company entered into a License Purchase Agreement (the "Spectrum License Purchase Agreement") with Spectrum Business Trust 2025-1, a Nevada Business Trust ("Trust") and EchoStar Corporation ("EchoStar" and the transactions contemplated thereby, "Spectrum Transaction"). On November 5, 2025 the parties amended and restated the Spectrum License Purchase Agreement to include EchoStar's licenses for up to 15 MHz of additional unpaired AWS-3 spectrum. The total consideration for the acquisition of EchoStar's spectrum is approximately $19.6 billion, consisting of (i) approximately $11.1 billion in equity, payable through the issuance of approximately 261.8 million shares of the Company's Class A common stock at a fixed value of $42.40 per share, and (ii) up to $8.5 billion related to the payoff of designated EchoStar debt, with any shortfall below $8.5 billion to be paid in cash. The allocation of cash and equity consideration is subject to certain adjustments based on the amount of EchoStar debt satisfied at or prior to closing. The Spectrum Transaction was approved by the FCC on May 12, 2026 and is expected to close on or about November 30, 2027 subject to other closing conditions. Upon closing, the Company intends to either use cash and cash equivalents on hand or seek alternative financing sources to fund the cash payment to EchoStar.
2025 年 9 月 7 日，公司与 Nevada Business Trust（“Trust”）和 EchoStar Corporation（“EchoStar”，相关交易合称”频谱交易”）下属的 Spectrum Business Trust 2025-1 签订了《许可证购买协议》（“频谱许可证购买协议”）。2025 年 11 月 5 日，双方对频谱许可证购买协议进行了修订和重述，以纳入 EchoStar 最多 15 MHz 额外非配对 AWS-3 频谱许可证。EchoStar 频谱收购的总对价约为 196 亿美元，包括 (i) 约 111 亿美元股权（通过以 42.40 美元每股的固定价值发行约 2.618 亿股公司 A 类普通股支付），以及 (ii) 与指定 EchoStar 债务偿付相关的最多 85 亿美元，若低于 85 亿美元的差额将以现金支付。现金与股权对价的分配将根据交割时或之前已偿付的 EchoStar 债务金额进行某些调整。频谱交易已于 2026 年 5 月 12 日获得 FCC 批准，预计将于 2027 年 11 月 30 日前后交割，但须满足其他交割条件。交割后，公司打算使用手头现金及现金等价物，或寻求替代融资来源，以向 EchoStar 支付现金对价。
As of March 31, 2026, we and our subsidiaries had outstanding $29,132 million in aggregate principal amount of indebtedness and no debt principal payments are due until August 28, 2027 if we choose not to extend. As of March 31, 2026, our total minimum lease payments was $5,823 million, of which $1,026 million is due within this fiscal year. For details regarding our indebtedness and lease obligations, refer to Note 10, Debt, and Note 11, Leases of our audited consolidated financial statements and Note 9, Debt of our unaudited consolidated financial statements included elsewhere in this prospectus.
截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，我们及子公司未偿债务本金总额为 291.32 亿美元，若我们选择不延期，则在 2027 年 8 月 28 日之前没有到期债务本金。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，我们最低租赁付款总额为 58.23 亿美元，其中本财年到期 10.26 亿美元。关于我们债务和租赁义务的详情，请参阅本招股说明书其他部分经审计合并财务报表附注 10”债务”和附注 11”租赁”以及未经审计合并财务报表附注 9”债务”。
Summary of Cash flows The following table summarizes our cash flows for the periods indicated:
现金流概览 下表概览了所述期间的现金流：
| | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | Three Months Ended March 31,| | Year Ended December 31, (in millions)| 2026| | 2025| | 2025| | 2024| | 2023 Net cash provided by (used in)| | | | | | | | | Operating activities ........................| $1,047| | $727| | $6,785| | $5,776| | $4,520 Investing activities .........................| $(16,724)| | $(4,170)| | $(19,575)| | $(10,796)| | $(4,867) Financing activities ........................| $7,125| | $354| | $26,350| | $11,830| | $422 Operating Activities Net cash provided by operating activities increased by $320 million from $727 million during the three months ended March 31, 2025 to $1,047 million during the three months ended March 31, 2026. This increase was primarily driven by an increase in working capital for deferred revenue of $1,153 million from upfront payments from our Space and Connectivity customers, partially offset by lower net income exclusive of non-cash items.
| | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | 截至 3 月 31 日的三个月| | 截至 12 月 31 日的年度 （百万美元）| 2026| | 2025| | 2025| | 2024| | 2023 提供（使用）的净现金| | | | | | | | | 经营活动 ........................| $1,047| | $727| | $6,785| | $5,776| | $4,520 投资活动 .........................| $(16,724)| | $(4,170)| | $(19,575)| | $(10,796)| | $(4,867) 融资活动 ........................| $7,125| | $354| | $26,350| | $11,830| | $422 经营活动 截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日三个月经营活动提供的净现金较截至 2025 年 3 月 31 日三个月的 7.27 亿美元增加 3.20 亿美元至 10.47 亿美元。该增长主要由我们太空和连接客户预付带来的递延收入运营资本增加 11.53 亿美元驱动，部分被剔除非现金项目后较低的净利润所抵消。
Net cash provided by operating activities increased by $1,009 million from $5,776 million during the year ended December 31, 2024 to $6,785 million during the year ended December 31, 2025. This increase was primarily driven by higher net income exclusive of non-cash items and an increase of $1,080 million for accounts payable and other liabilities as we continue to expand our infrastructure and timing of payments, and higher deferred revenue from cash received from upfront payments from our aviation customers. This increase was partially offset by an increase of $449 million for accounts receivable, prepaid expenses, and inventory.
截至 2025 年 12 月 31 日全年经营活动提供的净现金较截至 2024 年 12 月 31 日的全年 57.76 亿美元增加 10.09 亿美元至 67.85 亿美元。该增长主要由剔除非现金项目后较高的净利润、以及随我们持续扩展基础设施和付款时序导致应付账款和其他负债增加 10.80 亿美元、以及来自航空客户预付现金带来的更高递延收入驱动。该增长部分被应收账款、预付费用和存货增加 4.49 亿美元所抵消。
Net cash provided by operating activities increased by $1,256 million from $4,520 million during the year ended December 31, 2023 to $5,776 million during the year ended December 31, 2024. This increase was primarily driven by higher net income exclusive of non-cash items, partially offset by a decrease of $628 million for inventory, accounts receivable, prepaid expenses and other assets due to increase in our revenue and production of Starlink Kits.
