These include: securing additional land and developing high-rate launch sites and supporting infrastructure across multiple locations; scaling production of Starship vehicles and Raptor engines; constructing propellant production facilities, including air separation units and methane liquefaction plants co-located with launch sites; securing sufficient power supply; and obtaining the necessary regulatory approvals, particularly from the FAA, to support a high launch cadence while addressing public safety and environmental considerations. Our development of Starship and its associated infrastructure assumes continued successful iteration through flight testing, regulatory progress, supply chain scaling, and cost reduction driven by increasing reusability. We have made substantial investments in manufacturing scale-up, including Starfactory for high-volume vehicle production, multiple large-scale vertical integration and refurbishment facilities, additional launch towers, test infrastructure, propellant production assets, and power generation capabilities.
Starship 是我们增长目标的关键支撑，包括下一代 V3 卫星、直连蜂窝 (direct-to-cell) 星座和大规模轨道 AI 算力的部署。要在 Starship 上达成目标发射频率，需要在多个关键里程碑上取得重大进展并投入巨额资本。这些包括：获取额外土地并在多个地点开发高频次发射场及配套基础设施；扩大 Starship 载具和 Raptor 引擎的生产；建造与发射场共置的推进剂生产设施，包括空分装置和甲烷液化厂；保障足够的电力供应；以及获得必要监管批准——特别是来自 FAA 的批准——以支持高发射频率，同时兼顾公共安全和环境考量。我们对 Starship 及其相关基础设施的研发假定将持续通过飞行测试、监管进展、供应链扩张和可重复使用带来的成本降低进行成功迭代。我们已在制造扩张方面进行了大量投资，包括用于高产量载具生产的 Starfactory、多个大型垂直整合与翻新设施、额外的发射塔、测试基础设施、推进剂生产资产以及发电能力。
Full reusability of Starship's upper stage is not required to deploy our V3 satellites and V2 Mobile satellites in low- Earth orbit. In-orbit refueling is also not required for any of these LEO programs and is instead intended for missions beyond LEO, such as lunar and interplanetary transport. Starship's substantial payload capacity to LEO, even in partially reusable or expendable configurations, enables meaningful progress toward these objectives. We have already demonstrated Super Heavy booster reusability in multiple integrated flight tests. As a result, meaningful advancement across the deployment of next-generation V3 satellites, direct-to-cell constellations, and the orbital AI compute program is not dependent on achieving full reusability.
部署近地轨道的 V3 卫星和 V2 Mobile 卫星不要求 Starship 上面级的完全可重复使用。在轨加注对任何这些 LEO 项目都不是必需的，而是用于 LEO 之外的任务，如月球和行星际运输。即便在部分可重复使用或一次性配置下，Starship 对 LEO 的可观载荷能力也能推动这些目标的有意义进展。我们已在多次综合飞行测试中证明了 Super Heavy 助推器的可重复使用。因此，下一代 V3 卫星、direct-to-cell 星座以及轨道 AI 算力项目部署上的有意义进展并不依赖于实现完全可重复使用。
Starship Overview •Full and Rapid Reusability and Drastically Reduced Launch Costs: Starship's core design innovation is its full and rapid approach to reusability: both stages return to Earth for catch and rapid refurbishment. The Super Heavy booster returns to the launch site following stage separation and is caught mid-air by the launch tower's mechanical arms, also known as "chopsticks," to facilitate immediate inspection, refurbishment, and relaunch.
Starship 概览 • 完全且快速的可重复使用与大幅降低的发射成本：Starship 的核心设计创新是完全且快速的可重复使用方式：两级都返回地球以进行抓回和快速翻新。Super Heavy 助推器在级分离后返回发射场，由发射塔机械臂（也称为「筷子」）在空中抓住，以便立即检查、翻新和重新发射。
"Chopstick" Super Heavy Booster Catch The Starship upper stage, after orbital delivery or missions beyond, is designed to reenter protected by advanced heat shield tiles, execute a propulsive landing burn, and be similarly caught mid-air by the launch tower's mechanical arms. We believe that Starship's full and rapid reusability will enable sub-one hour reflights, causing a paradigm shift in launch cadence.
「筷子」抓回 Super Heavy 助推器 Starship 上面级在入轨投送或更远任务后，被设计为由先进隔热瓦保护重返大气、执行推进着陆点火，并被发射塔机械臂同样在空中抓回。我们相信 Starship 的完全且快速可重复使用将让一小时内即可复飞成为可能，引发发射频率上的范式转变。
Starship Landing Burn •Improvements in Engine Development Underpin Starship's Massive Payload Capacity: With a payload bay volume rivaling the pressurized sections of the International Space Station, Starship is designed to deploy structures like space station modules, large telescopes, our next-generation V3 satellites, and future AI compute satellites. Starship is powered by 39 Raptor engines, which are full-flow staged combustion cycle rocket engines burning cryogenic liquid methane and liquid oxygen. Raptor engines offer nearly triple the thrust per engine, higher efficiency, and better performance for heavy-lift and deep space missions compared to the Merlin engine used on Falcon 9. Each Raptor 3 engine in Starship saves nearly a ton of vehicle mass compared to previous generations by removing heat shields and simplifying plumbing. Starship's capacity enables the next leg of our growth, including scaling our Starlink Mobile constellation and orbital AI compute.
Starship 着陆点火 • 引擎研发的改进支撑了 Starship 巨大的载荷能力：Starship 的载荷舱体积可与国际空间站加压段相媲美，被设计为部署诸如空间站模块、大型望远镜、下一代 V3 卫星和未来 AI 算力卫星等结构。Starship 由 39 台 Raptor 引擎驱动，这些是燃烧低温液态甲烷和液氧的全流量分级燃烧循环火箭引擎。相比 Falcon 9 使用的 Merlin 引擎，Raptor 引擎单台推力近三倍，效率更高，重载和深空任务表现更佳。Starship 上每台 Raptor 3 引擎通过移除隔热罩和简化管路，比上一代节省了近一吨载具质量。Starship 的容量将支撑我们增长的下一阶段，包括扩展 Starlink Mobile 星座和轨道 AI 算力。
•Orbital Refueling: Starship's expected orbital refueling capability will allow tanker variants to refill the upper stage in LEO and extend its range for deep-space missions beyond Earth's orbit. These capabilities are expected to revolutionize mission architecture, with each Starship designed to be capable of transporting large numbers of people or hundreds of metric tons of cargo to destinations like the surface of the Moon and Mars.
• 在轨加注：Starship 预期的在轨加注能力将允许加注变体在 LEO 中给上面级加注，并扩展其执行地球轨道之外深空任务的航程。这些能力预计将革新任务架构——每艘 Starship 被设计为有能力向月球表面和火星等目的地运送大量人员或数百吨货物。
•Sustainable Human Exploration Beyond Earth: Starship was designed from the beginning to fly to other worlds and enable self-growing bases on the Moon, an entire civilization on Mars, and ultimately expansion beyond our solar system. As NASA's Human Landing System for Artemis, Starship is built to deliver astronauts and cargo to the lunar surface and serve as the key enabler for supporting permanent presence on the Moon.
• 地球之外的可持续载人探索：Starship 从一开始就被设计用于飞往其他世界，并支持在月球上的自生长基地、在火星上的整个文明，最终扩展到太阳系之外。作为 NASA Artemis 的载人着陆系统（Human Landing System），Starship 被建造用于把宇航员和货物运送到月球表面，作为支持月球永久存在的关键支撑。
•Versatility Across Mission Profiles: Beyond deep space, Starship is designed to adapt to diverse roles including the U.S. Space Force's Rocket Cargo program for rapid point-to-point global logistics, Starlink and other commercial satellite constellations, in-orbit manufacturing components and hardware, space tourism, and others.
• 跨任务剖面的多样性：除了深空，Starship 还被设计为适应多种角色，包括美国太空军的 Rocket Cargo 项目（用于快速点对点全球物流）、Starlink 和其他商业卫星星座、在轨制造组件和硬件、太空旅游等。
Starship is designed to enable a step-function advancement in our capabilities, featuring rapid, full reusability of both the Super Heavy booster and the Starship spacecraft to achieve unprecedented throughput at significantly reduced costs compared to existing systems. As Starship progresses toward full operational utilization, the Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy platforms will remain key assets for specialized missions, including NASA crew rotations and national security payloads.
Starship 被设计为推动我们能力的跃迁式提升，其特征是 Super Heavy 助推器和 Starship 飞船的快速、完全可重复使用，从而相比现有系统在显著降低成本的同时实现前所未有的吞吐量。随着 Starship 朝着完全运营使用迈进，Falcon 9 和 Falcon Heavy 平台仍将是专用任务（包括 NASA 的机组轮换和国家安全载荷）的关键资产。
Dragon Cargo Spacecraft. The Dragon cargo spacecraft is an uncrewed vehicle designed primarily for transporting cargo to and from the International Space Station under NASA's Commercial Resupply Services program. As an evolution of the original Dragon spacecraft, this vehicle represents a critical component of our portfolio, enabling reliable, cost-effective logistics for space missions. The spacecraft consists of a pressurized section for environmentally controlled cargo and an unpressurized trunk section for additional payloads. It has a launch payload mass of up to 6,000 kilograms and a return payload mass of 3,000 kilograms, making it uniquely suited for both delivery and retrieval of scientific experiments, supplies, and hardware, and establishing SpaceX as the only company capable of returning significant amounts of cargo from the International Space Station back to Earth.
Dragon 货运航天器。Dragon 货运航天器是一种无人飞行器，主要在 NASA 的 Commercial Resupply Services 项目下运送往返国际空间站的货物。作为原始 Dragon 航天器的演进版本，该载具是我们组合的关键组成部分，为太空任务提供可靠、高效的物流。该航天器由用于环境控制货物的加压段和用于额外有效载荷的非加压舱段组成。它的发射载荷质量最多 6,000 公斤，返回载荷质量为 3,000 公斤，使其特别适合科学实验、补给和硬件的运送和回收，确立了 SpaceX 为唯一一家有能力把大量货物从国际空间站送回地球的公司。
Dragon Cargo Overview •Key features: Key highlights of the Dragon cargo spacecraft include its propulsion system with 16 Draco thrusters for precise orbital maneuvering, autonomous docking capabilities via NASA's International Docking System Standard (IDSS), and a trunk equipped with solar panels for power generation during flight.
Dragon Cargo 概览 • 关键特性：Dragon 货运航天器的关键亮点包括其推进系统配备 16 台 Draco 推进器用于精确轨道机动、通过 NASA 的国际对接系统标准（IDSS, International Docking System Standard）的自主对接能力，以及配备太阳能板用于飞行期间发电的舱段。
•Launch vehicle, return mechanism and mission profiles: The spacecraft is launched atop the Falcon 9 rocket and returns to Earth via parachute-assisted splashdown in the ocean, where it is recovered for refurbishment and reuse. Dragon supports extended in-orbit durations, typically spending several weeks docked to the International Space Station before undocking with returned cargo.
• 发射载具、返回机制和任务剖面：该航天器由 Falcon 9 火箭顶端发射，通过降落伞辅助溅落返回地球，并被回收以便翻新和重复使用。Dragon 支持延长的在轨时间，通常在国际空间站对接数周后再分离并把货物带回。
•Historic accomplishments: Launched by Falcon 9 in 2012, our Dragon spacecraft became the first commercial spacecraft to deliver cargo to and from the International Space Station and, eight years later, the first privately built vehicle to fly humans to the orbiting laboratory. This achievement ended U.S. reliance on foreign vehicles for International Space Station resupply following the Space Shuttle's retirement in 2011. The original Dragon variant (later known as Dragon 1) established a critical role in advancing research on the space station as the only spacecraft capable of returning significant amounts of cargo to Earth. The upgraded cargo spacecraft pioneered autonomous docking without robotic arm assistance, delivered major hardware upgrades for the station including new solar arrays, and recently debuted the ability to reboost the station's altitude. It remains the only reusable cargo spacecraft in operation. As of March 31, 2026, our Dragon spacecraft has completed over 30 cargo missions to the International Space Station.
• 历史性成就：我们的 Dragon 航天器于 2012 年由 Falcon 9 发射，成为第一艘把货物运往国际空间站并返回的商业航天器，并在 8 年后成为首艘把人类送往这一轨道实验室的私营建造载具。这一成就结束了 2011 年 Space Shuttle 退役后美国对外国载具进行国际空间站补给的依赖。最初的 Dragon 变体（后称为 Dragon 1）作为唯一能把大量货物送回地球的航天器，在推进空间站研究方面发挥了关键作用。升级版货运航天器开创了无机械臂辅助的自主对接，向空间站交付了重大硬件升级（包括新太阳能阵列），最近还首次展示了提升空间站轨道高度的能力。它仍是唯一在役的可重复使用货运航天器。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，我们的 Dragon 航天器已完成超过 30 次往返国际空间站的货运任务。
Dragon Crew Spacecraft. Dragon is engineered to fly humans to and from Earth orbit, including the International Space Station. The spacecraft is designed to accommodate up to seven passengers, with a pressurized cabin for crew habitation, life support systems, and cargo.
Dragon 载人航天器。Dragon 被工程化为把人类运送至地球轨道及国际空间站。该航天器可容纳最多七名乘客，配备机组居住的加压舱、生命保障系统和货物。
Dragon Orbiting Earth's Poles •Key features: Dragon Crew spacecraft is equipped with advanced avionics, touchscreen interfaces for manual control, and an integrated trunk with solar power generation. Dragon Crew's propulsion includes 16 Draco thrusters for orbital adjustments and 8 Super Draco engines for its launch escape system, enabling rapid separation from the rocket in the unlikely event of an emergency.
Dragon 绕地球极地飞行 • 关键特性：Dragon 载人航天器配备先进的航电、触摸屏手动控制接口，以及带太阳能发电的一体化舱段。Dragon 载人版的推进包括 16 台 Draco 推进器用于轨道调整，以及 8 台 Super Draco 引擎用于发射逃逸系统——能在罕见的紧急情况下实现与火箭的快速分离。
•Launch vehicle, return mechanism and mission profiles: The spacecraft is launched atop the Falcon 9 rocket and returns to Earth via parachute-assisted splashdown in the ocean, where it is recovered for refurbishment and reuse. The design emphasizes reusability, with vehicles certified for multiple flights after refurbishment, and supports missions lasting up to nine months on the International Space Station.
• 发射载具、返回机制和任务剖面：该航天器由 Falcon 9 火箭顶端发射，通过降落伞辅助溅落返回地球，并被回收以便翻新和重复使用。设计强调可重复使用，载具经过翻新后被认证用于多次飞行，并支持在国际空间站最长 9 个月的任务。
•Historic accomplishments: Revolutionary accomplishments of Dragon include being the first privately developed spacecraft to transport humans to and from the International Space Station, achieved during the Demo-2 mission in May 2020 which carried NASA astronauts Doug Hurley and Bob Behnken. This milestone returned human spaceflight capabilities to the United States for the first time since the Space Shuttle's retirement in 2011, reducing dependence on foreign spacecraft. Dragon has enabled regular astronaut rotations under NASA's Commercial Crew Program, flying nearly 15 successful Crew and Private Astronaut missions to the International Space Station to date, while pioneering space tourism by carrying commercial astronauts on private flights. Its autonomous docking technology, life support for extended durations, and abort system have set new safety standards achieving a flawless record in crewed operations.
• 历史性成就：Dragon 的革命性成就包括成为首款由私营开发、运送人类往返国际空间站的航天器——2020 年 5 月的 Demo-2 任务实现了这一里程碑，搭载了 NASA 宇航员 Doug Hurley 和 Bob Behnken。这一里程碑让美国自 2011 年 Space Shuttle 退役以来首次重新拥有载人航天能力，减少了对外国航天器的依赖。Dragon 在 NASA 的 Commercial Crew Program 下支持定期的宇航员轮换，迄今已执行近 15 次成功的机组与私营宇航员任务，并通过搭载商业宇航员开展私人飞行开创了太空旅游。其自主对接技术、长周期生命保障和中止系统树立了新的安全标准，载人作业上保持完美记录。
Connectivity Starlink Consumer Broadband Starlink Consumer Broadband is a broadband network powered by our global LEO satellite constellation, designed to deliver high-speed, low-latency internet connectivity anywhere on Earth. The service provides fiber-like download speeds with latency low enough to support intensive real-time applications, such as content streaming, video calls, and online gaming, while requiring only visible sight to the sky and electricity for installation. Since launch, Starlink has scaled rapidly, serving approximately 10.3 million subscribers across 164 countries, territories, and other markets as of March 31, 2026.
连接 Starlink Consumer Broadband Starlink Consumer Broadband 是由我们全球 LEO 卫星星座驱动的宽带网络，旨在向地球上任何地方提供高速、低延迟的互联网连接。该服务提供光纤级的下载速度，延迟低到足以支持密集型实时应用——如内容流媒体、视频通话和在线游戏——而安装只需对天空有可视线和电力。自启动以来，Starlink 已快速扩张，截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日在 164 个国家、地区及其他市场服务约 1,030 万订阅用户。
Starlink Consumer Broadband is enabled by the largest satellite constellation in human history with approximately 9,000 broadband satellites as of March 31, 2026, operating in LEO to deliver latency comparable to many terrestrial broadband connections. We launched approximately 3,100 Starlink broadband and mobile satellites in 2025, which is approximately five times more than the total number of active satellites in the entire second largest LEO satellite constellation. We provide download speeds exceeding 400 Mbps with round-trip latencies as low as 21 milliseconds --performance that rivals or surpasses traditional terrestrial broadband while also reaching locations no traditional fiber or cellular network can economically serve. Satellite-based communications are uniquely suited to reach underserved and remote areas by delivering coverage directly from LEO without requiring local infrastructure. In contrast, terrestrial networks depend on costly, ground-based buildouts that are often uneconomical in low-density or hard-to-access regions. As of March 31, 2026, the constellation incorporated over 23,000 inter-satellite lasers that create a dynamic mesh network in space, enabling traffic to route through orbit rather than relying solely on terrestrial backhaul infrastructure. Satellites autonomously maneuver to avoid collisions and are designed for controlled end-of-life deorbit, supporting long-term orbital sustainability. Successive generations of our broadband satellites, including V3 satellites, are expected to increase throughput, power capacity, and network efficiency, with production vertically integrated and performed largely in-house. Our focus on vertical integration has allowed us to reduce the Starlink satellite manufacturing cost per one Gbps of downlink capacity by approximately three times from Starlink V1 Broadband satellites to V2 Mini satellites. We expect to achieve a total cost reduction of nine times from Starlink V1 Broadband satellites to V3 satellites.
Starlink Consumer Broadband 由人类历史上最大的卫星星座支撑——截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日约有 9,000 颗宽带卫星——在 LEO 运行，提供与许多地面宽带连接相当的延迟。我们在 2025 年发射了约 3,100 颗 Starlink 宽带和移动卫星，约是排名第二的整个 LEO 卫星星座有效卫星总数的五倍。我们提供超过 400 Mbps 的下载速度，往返延迟低至 21 毫秒——这种性能可与传统地面宽带匹敌或超越，同时还能到达没有传统光纤或蜂窝网络能经济服务的地点。基于卫星的通信特别适合通过直接从 LEO 提供覆盖、无需本地基础设施来触达服务不足和偏远地区。相反，地面网络依赖昂贵的地面建设，这在低密度或难以接入地区往往不经济。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，星座集成了超过 23,000 条星间激光，在太空中构建动态网状网络，使流量能通过轨道路由，而不仅依赖地面回程基础设施。卫星自主机动以避免碰撞，并被设计为受控的报废离轨，支持长期轨道可持续性。我们宽带卫星的几代后续产品（包括 V3 卫星）预计将提升吞吐、电力容量和网络效率，生产实现垂直整合并主要在内部完成。我们对垂直整合的专注使我们能够把每 1 Gbps 下行容量的 Starlink 卫星制造成本从 Starlink V1 Broadband 卫星到 V2 Mini 卫星降低约三倍。我们预计从 Starlink V1 Broadband 卫星到 V3 卫星实现总成本降低九倍。
Starlink Broadband V2 and V3 Satellites On Earth, users access the network through proprietary Starlink terminals that we design and manufacture. As of March 31, 2026, we have reduced the cost of Starlink terminals--achieving an approximately 59% reduction in the average manufacturing cost of a Starlink Kit since 2022--while improving performance and reliability, which we believe collectively provides us a meaningful and durable competitive advantage over other terrestrial and satellite broadband providers. Our portfolio of terminals, which we are able to manufacture and sell for a fraction of the cost of terminals used by other satellite internet providers, includes three primary consumer configurations including: a Standard terminal designed for fixed residential and small business use, featuring a wide field of view; a Mini terminal roughly the size of a laptop, designed for mobility and travel use cases with a built-in Wi-Fi router and the ability to operate on portable battery systems or 12V vehicle power; and the Performance terminal, designed for demanding environments, with a maximum download speed over 450 Mbps and a higher power consumption of 110W or more under load. Each type of terminal is designed to be quick and seamless for a consumer to self-set up, support in-motion connectivity up to speeds of 100 mph, and deliver global, oceanwide coverage for consumer maritime use. We believe that this combination of low cost, portability (particularly in the case of our Starlink Mini terminal), and ease of installation of our terminals will help scale our consumer broadband offering.
Starlink Broadband V2 与 V3 卫星 在地球上，用户通过我们设计和制造的自研 Starlink 终端接入网络。截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日，我们已降低 Starlink 终端的成本——自 2022 年以来 Starlink Kit 的平均制造成本约下降 59%——同时提升性能和可靠性，我们相信这些综合优势相对于其他地面和卫星宽带提供方提供了显著且持久的竞争优势。我们的终端组合（我们能以其他卫星互联网提供方所用终端成本的一小部分制造和销售）包括三种主要消费配置：Standard 终端——为固定住宅和小型商业用途设计，视场广；Mini 终端——大约笔记本电脑大小，专为移动和旅行用例设计，内置 Wi-Fi 路由器，可在便携电池系统或 12V 车载电源上运行；以及 Performance 终端——为高要求环境设计，最大下载速度超过 450 Mbps，在负载下功耗为 110 W 或更高。每种终端都被设计为消费者快速且无缝自助安装，支持最高 100 mph 的运动中连接，并为消费者海事用途提供全球、全洋面覆盖。我们相信低成本、便携性（尤其是 Starlink Mini 终端）以及终端易安装性的组合，将帮助我们扩展消费者宽带产品。
Starlink Standard and Mini User Terminals We monetize Starlink primarily through subscription plans paired with hardware sales. Service tiers vary by speed, priority access, geographic coverage, and mobility requirements, including Local and Global Priority options for small to medium sized business, enterprise, and government Starlink customers. As the constellation scales and capacity expands with next-generation satellites, we expect Starlink to continue growing as a global, recurring- revenue connectivity platform and foundational layer of a space-enabled digital economy.
Starlink Standard 和 Mini 用户终端 我们主要通过订阅计划搭配硬件销售对 Starlink 进行变现。服务层级按速度、优先访问、地理覆盖和移动性要求而变化，包括面向中小企业、企业和政府 Starlink 客户的 Local 与 Global Priority 选项。随着星座扩张和下一代卫星容量提升，我们预计 Starlink 将继续作为全球性、经常性收入的连接平台和天基数字经济的基础层而增长。
Enterprise Solutions Enterprise Solutions offers the same fundamental advantages of Starlink Consumer Broadband--high throughput, low-latency, and global coverage--into mission-critical, in-motion, and distributed connectivity environments for enterprises. Starlink's architecture is designed to deliver consistent performance across routes, oceans, and remote industrial sites. Enterprise services are supported by dedicated hardware configurations and commercial structures tailored to usage intensity, service-level requirements, and fleet-scale deployments.
企业解决方案 企业解决方案把 Starlink Consumer Broadband 的基本优势——高吞吐、低延迟和全球覆盖——带入企业关键任务、运动中和分布式连接环境。Starlink 的架构旨在跨航线、海洋和偏远工业站点提供一致的性能。企业服务由专用硬件配置和针对使用强度、服务级别要求和车队规模部署量身定制的商业结构支持。
Enterprise Solutions Aviation Connectivity Starlink Aviation provides broadband connectivity for commercial and private aircraft, enabling high-quality internet service for passengers and crew from gate to gate, including during taxi and prior to take-off. The service is differentiated by materially lower latency and higher throughput than legacy in-flight connectivity systems, enabling streaming, video conferencing, and real-time applications at scale while in flight--even bandwidth-intensive applications such as gaming, previously impractical from an airplane. Starlink's global network is designed to eliminate "dead zones" and supports performance on polar and high-latitude routes that can be challenging for traditional providers. In recent years, we have assembled dedicated sales and engineering teams to market and support fleet-wide conversions in the aviation sector. This has enabled partnerships with many of the world's leading airlines, including United Airlines, Southwest Airlines, Qatar Airways, Lufthansa Group, British Airways, Alaska Airlines, and Hawaiian Airlines, many of which have implemented or committed to fleet-wide Starlink installations for seamless in-flight connectivity.
企业解决方案 航空连接 Starlink Aviation 为商业和私人飞机提供宽带连接，让乘客和机组从登机口到登机口（包括滑行和起飞前）享有高质量互联网服务。该服务的差异化在于显著低于传统机上连接系统的延迟和显著更高的吞吐——即便在飞行中也能大规模支持流媒体、视频会议和实时应用，甚至此前在飞机上不实际的带宽密集型应用（如游戏）。Starlink 的全球网络旨在消除「盲区」，并支持传统提供方常遇挑战的极地和高纬度航线的性能。近年来我们组建了专门的销售和工程团队，营销并支持航空行业的全机队迁移。这促成了与全球许多领先航空公司的合作，包括 United Airlines、Southwest Airlines、Qatar Airways、Lufthansa Group、British Airways、Alaska Airlines 和 Hawaiian Airlines，其中许多公司已实施或承诺全机队部署 Starlink 以实现无缝机上连接。
Maritime Connectivity Starlink Maritime provides broadband connectivity for vessels operating in coastal and deep-ocean environments, supporting both operational requirements (navigation, telemetry, maintenance, logistics) and end-user connectivity (crew welfare and passenger internet). The service is designed for consistent coverage regardless of proximity to land, including routes that may experience service degradation under legacy satellite architectures. Starlink terminals are engineered for marine operating conditions and are designed to be installed or swapped efficiently alongside existing onboard communications systems, reducing downtime during retrofit. For many maritime operators, Starlink functions as a wholesale or "syndicated" connectivity layer: vessel owners or cruise operators purchase and allocate capacity across passengers, crew, and critical ship systems, including when reselling Wi-Fi access as an onboard service. Pricing structures vary by vessel class, expected consumption, coverage requirements (coastal vs.
海事连接 Starlink Maritime 为在沿海和远洋环境中运营的船舶提供宽带连接，支持运营要求（导航、遥测、维护、物流）和终端用户连接（船员福祉和乘客互联网）。该服务被设计为无论距陆地远近都能提供一致覆盖，包括在传统卫星架构下可能出现服务退化的航线。Starlink 终端为海上运营条件进行工程化设计，可在现有船上通信系统旁高效安装或更换，减少改装期间的停机时间。对许多海事运营商而言，Starlink 起到批发或「联合」连接层的作用：船东或邮轮运营商购买并把容量分配给乘客、船员和关键船舶系统，包括在转售 Wi-Fi 接入作为船上服务时。定价结构按船舶类别、预期消耗、覆盖要求（沿海与
ocean), and priority level, and are generally implemented through recurring subscription arrangements with fleet- based commercial terms. To support fleet-wide conversions in the maritime sector, we have partnered with premier cruise operators, such as Carnival Corporation, Royal Caribbean Group, MSC Cruises, and Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings, for full-fleet deployments that deliver reliable high-speed internet across thousands of vessels worldwide.
远洋）和优先级而异，通常通过基于车队的商业条款的经常性订阅安排来实施。为支持海事行业的全船队迁移，我们与顶级邮轮运营商合作，如 Carnival Corporation、Royal Caribbean Group、MSC Cruises 和 Norwegian Cruise Line Holdings，在全球数千艘船上交付可靠的高速互联网。
Land Mobility and IoT Starlink supports in-motion connectivity for land mobility and industrial IoT applications where terrestrial networks are intermittent or unavailable. These deployments include fleet vehicles, remote field operations, and ruggedized use cases that require continuous broadband while moving, often across large geographies. The service is particularly relevant for emergency responders, disaster recovery, and critical infrastructure continuity, where resilient communications materially impact safety and response effectiveness. In industrial settings, Starlink can serve as a connectivity backbone for connected equipment and telemetry-driven workflows, enabling real-time monitoring and remote operations in agriculture, energy, and logistics environments. Commercial deployments are typically structured around fleets or enterprise accounts, with hardware and service tiers aligned to mobility requirements, usage intensity, and priority performance. We have partnered with land mobility operators, including John Deere and the California Fire Department, as well as passenger rail operators such as Brightline (Florida), and Italo Treno, to provide remote monitoring and management of their fleets.
陆地移动与物联网 Starlink 在地面网络间歇或不可用的情况下为陆地移动和工业 IoT 应用提供运动中连接。这些部署包括车队车辆、偏远野外作业以及需要在大地理范围内移动时持续宽带的坚固化用例。该服务对紧急响应、灾后恢复和关键基础设施持续性尤为相关——这些场景中有韧性通信对安全和响应效果有实质影响。在工业环境中，Starlink 可作为联网设备和遥测驱动工作流的连接骨干，使农业、能源和物流环境的实时监控和远程作业成为可能。商业部署通常围绕车队或企业账户构建，硬件和服务层级与移动性要求、使用强度和优先性能对齐。我们已与陆地移动运营商合作，包括 John Deere 和加州消防局，以及客运铁路运营商如 Brightline（佛罗里达）和 Italo Treno，提供其车队的远程监控与管理。
Starlink Fixed Site Starlink Fixed Site is designed to provide primary or backup connectivity for distributed business locations globally, including sites that are difficult to serve economically with fiber or that require redundancy for uptime. Starlink's lack of dependence on wireline infrastructure--which is subject to damage or disruption from natural disasters, conflict, and other events--makes it well-suited for businesses that rely on continuous broadband connectivity and cannot afford a terrestrial offering going temporarily "offline." Customers deploy Starlink to support point-of-sale systems, corporate networking, video and security systems, and business continuity, including during disasters and localized outages where terrestrial infrastructure may be impaired. The service is differentiated by rapid installability, geographic flexibility, and reliable performance in remote and hard-to-reach locations, making it suitable for retailers, industrial operators, and remote facilities (including offshore and field sites). Pricing models include multiple tiers and configurations depending on speed, priority access, coverage footprint, and the number of sites deployed, with typical enterprise arrangements structured as recurring subscriptions paired with hardware.
Starlink Fixed Site Starlink Fixed Site 旨在为全球分布式业务地点提供主用或备份连接，包括那些用光纤经济服务困难或需要冗余以保证正常运行时间的站点。Starlink 不依赖有线基础设施——而有线基础设施易受自然灾害、冲突和其他事件的破坏或中断——这使其非常适合那些依赖持续宽带连接、无法承受地面方案暂时「下线」的企业。客户部署 Starlink 以支持 POS 系统、企业网络、视频和安全系统以及业务连续性，包括在地面基础设施可能受损的灾害和局部停电期间。该服务的差异化在于快速可安装性、地理灵活性以及在偏远和难以到达地点的可靠性能，使其适合零售商、工业运营商和偏远设施（包括海上和野外站点）。定价模型根据速度、优先访问、覆盖范围和部署站点数量包含多个层级和配置，典型的企业安排是经常性订阅搭配硬件。
Government Solutions We provide U.S. civil, state, and local government agencies as well as international civil government agencies high- speed, resilient connectivity for public services, social impact, humanitarian efforts, and disaster response in even the most remote and challenging environments. Examples include support for the FEMA in coordinating disaster recovery after hurricanes and wildfires, the NOAA for at-sea testing and environmental monitoring, the Government of the Philippines for linking remote islands, schools, and public institutions, the Government of Jamaica for improving digital access in remote and maritime areas, and the Government of Ecuador for supporting education and healthcare connectivity in isolated communities.
政府解决方案 我们在最偏远和最具挑战性的环境中，向美国民用、州和地方政府机构以及国际民用政府机构提供高速、有韧性的连接，用于公共服务、社会影响、人道主义工作和灾难响应。例子包括：支持 FEMA 协调飓风和野火后的灾后恢复，支持 NOAA 进行海上测试和环境监测，支持菲律宾政府连接偏远岛屿、学校和公共机构，支持牙买加政府改善偏远和海上地区的数字接入，以及支持厄瓜多尔政府为偏远社区的教育和医疗连接提供保障。
Separately, we operate Starshield, a secure satellite network designed specifically for national security applications.
另外，我们运营 Starshield——一张专为国家安全应用设计的安全卫星网络。
Built on the technology, manufacturing, and launch infrastructure that underpin Starlink, Starshield is focused on three core mission areas: Earth observation, global secure communications, and hosted payloads. Starshield satellites are designed to integrate a wide range of sensors and instruments, allowing government customers to deploy mission-specific capabilities in LEO without having to design, build, and launch standalone spacecraft for every program.
建立在支撑 Starlink 的技术、制造和发射基础设施之上，Starshield 聚焦三大核心任务领域：地球观测、全球安全通信和托管载荷。Starshield 卫星被设计为可集成各种传感器和仪器，使政府客户能在 LEO 中部署任务专属能力，而无需为每个项目设计、建造和发射独立航天器。
Starshield builds on the end-to-end data encryption used in our commercial network by adding high-assurance cryptographic capabilities tailored to military and other government requirements. By combining this security posture with our high-cadence launch capability and evolving Starlink-derived infrastructure, we aim to offer a scalable national security platform that can be updated, replenished, and expanded as mission needs change over time.
Starshield 在我们商业网络端到端数据加密的基础上，叠加针对军事和其他政府要求定制的高保证加密能力。通过把这种安全姿态与我们的高频次发射能力和不断演进的、源自 Starlink 的基础设施结合，我们旨在提供一个可扩展的国家安全平台，能随任务需求变化进行更新、补充和扩展。
Starlink Mobile We are extending the reach of Starlink beyond fixed and mobility terminals through our mobile service, connecting smartphones (with no modifications or incremental hardware) and other terrestrial devices directly to our satellites.
Starlink Mobile 我们正通过移动服务把 Starlink 的覆盖范围扩展到固定和移动性终端之外，将智能手机（无需任何修改或额外硬件）和其他地面设备直接连接到我们的卫星。
We aim to entirely eliminate mobile "dead zones." By using satellites that effectively function as cell towers in space, we enable data, over-the-top voice, video and messaging in remote and hard-to-reach locations where terrestrial networks have historically been unavailable or unreliable. Starlink Mobile is already commercially available for messaging in select markets and has been used to support emergency communications following natural disasters, demonstrating its strength as resilient, infrastructure-independent connectivity.
我们旨在完全消除移动「盲区」。通过使用实际充当太空中蜂窝塔的卫星，我们让数据、Over-the-Top 语音、视频和消息在历史上地面网络不可用或不可靠的偏远、难以到达地点成为可能。Starlink Mobile 已在部分市场商用提供短信服务，并已在自然灾害后用于支持紧急通信，展示了其作为有韧性、独立于基础设施的连接的优势。
V1 Mobile Satellites and V2 Mobile Satellites Our mobile constellation builds on the same LEO architecture as our broadband network, with satellites specifically designed to communicate directly with everyday LTE handsets and IoT devices without requiring specialized or additional hardware. These satellites use exclusive licensed spectrum, allowing us to integrate into MNOs' existing networks while delivering coverage far beyond the reach of ground-based towers. Since launching the first mobile satellites in early 2024, we have rapidly scaled the network to hundreds of in-orbit spacecraft and demonstrated key technical milestones, including the first SMS tests within days of launch, live video calls, and public posts sent directly from standard smartphones through a Starlink Mobile satellite. Our ability to design, manufacture and launch these satellites on our own vehicles enables us to iterate quickly on payloads and software, expanding capacity and performance over time.
V1 Mobile 卫星和 V2 Mobile 卫星 我们的移动星座基于与宽带网络相同的 LEO 架构构建，卫星被专门设计为直接与日常 LTE 手机和物联网设备通信，而无需专业或额外硬件。这些卫星使用专属授权频谱，使我们能在向远超地面基站覆盖范围交付覆盖的同时，集成到移动网络运营商的现有网络中。自 2024 年初首批移动卫星发射以来，我们已快速把网络扩展到在轨数百颗航天器，并展示了关键技术里程碑——包括发射后数日内的首次 SMS 测试、实时视频通话，以及从标准智能手机通过 Starlink Mobile 卫星直接发出的公开帖子。我们在自有载具上设计、制造和发射这些卫星的能力使我们能够快速迭代载荷和软件，随时间扩展容量和性能。
Today, our Starlink Mobile service is delivered in partnership with leading mobile network operators around the world. We are initially focused on messaging for consumer subscribers in areas with limited or no terrestrial coverage, with a roadmap to support broader data, voice and IoT services. We partner with approximately 30 MNOs across six continents, including T-Mobile in the United States, and other international operators including One NZ, Optus, Telstra, Rogers, KDDI, Salt, Entel, Kyivstar, and VMO2. Through these partnerships, we enable consumers, businesses and public-sector customers to use their existing phones in more places, support critical connectivity during disasters and power outages, and open new applications for low-bandwidth mobile and IoT devices.
如今我们的 Starlink Mobile 服务与全球领先移动网络运营商合作交付。我们最初聚焦于在地面覆盖有限或没有的地区为消费者订阅用户提供短信，并有路线图支持更广泛的数据、语音和 IoT 服务。我们在六大洲与约 30 家移动网络运营商合作，包括美国的 T-Mobile，以及其他国际运营商 One NZ、Optus、Telstra、Rogers、KDDI、Salt、Entel、Kyivstar 和 VMO2。通过这些合作，我们让消费者、企业和公共部门客户能在更多地方使用现有手机，在灾难和断电期间支持关键连接，并为低带宽移动和物联网设备开拓新应用。
Map of Starlink Mobile Coverage Satellite Life We estimate that our satellites have useful lives of three to five years based on engineering studies, historical on- orbit performance, propellant life, utilization patterns, design enhancements across generations, and planned transitions to newer satellite technology. We, however, often deorbit satellites before the end of their useful lives, primarily to reduce degradation risks that could impair our autonomous collision avoidance system and compromise constellation safety. To date, our autonomous collision avoidance system has not experienced any failures resulting in satellite loss, and satellite losses from other causes remain de minimis.
Starlink Mobile 覆盖图 卫星寿命 基于工程研究、历史在轨表现、推进剂寿命、使用模式、代际设计增强以及向新一代卫星技术的计划过渡，我们估计卫星的有效使用寿命为三至五年。但我们经常在有效使用寿命结束前让卫星离轨——主要为减少可能影响自主碰撞回避系统并损害星座安全的退化风险。截至目前，我们的自主碰撞回避系统没有发生导致卫星损失的失效，因其他原因造成的卫星损失也极少。
AI Grok Grok represents a core pillar of our mission to advance humanity's understanding of the universe through the development of truth-seeking artificial intelligence. Grok is designed and optimized for rigorous reasoning, real-time information synthesis, and transparent outputs, with a product philosophy centered on intellectual honesty, first- principles thinking, and engagement with complex topics.
AI Grok Grok 是我们推动人类通过追求真理的人工智能开发理解宇宙这一使命的核心支柱之一。Grok 被设计并优化用于严谨推理、实时信息综合和透明输出，产品哲学围绕智识诚实、第一性原理思维和与复杂主题的互动。
Grok is designed as a truth-seeking AI model, built on our founder Elon Musk's mission to enable humanity to understand the universe. We believe that accomplishing this mission requires a truth-seeking approach to AI. We define truth seeking as the active, relentless pursuit of what is objectively true about reality, and grounded in evidence, logic, empirical data, and first principles thinking. Our goal is to understand and explain what the universe appears to be doing, as accurately as current knowledge allows. In pursuit of this truth-seeking objective, Grok also benefits from its integration with X, our real-time information, entertainment, and free speech platform. This direct, real-time access to the information and human discourse on X enhances Grok's truth-seeking capabilities by grounding outputs in up-to-date knowledge and diverse viewpoints.
Grok 被设计为追求真理的 AI 模型，建立在我们创始人 Elon Musk 让人类理解宇宙的使命之上。我们相信完成这一使命需要以追求真理的方式做 AI。我们将「追求真理」定义为：主动、不懈地追求关于现实客观为真的东西，并以证据、逻辑、经验数据和第一性原理思维为根基。我们的目标是在当前知识允许的范围内，尽可能准确地理解和解释宇宙正在做什么。在这一追求真理目标下，Grok 还得益于与我们的实时信息、娱乐和言论自由平台 X 的整合。这种对 X 上信息和人类讨论的直接、实时访问，通过将输出建立在最新知识和多元观点之上，增强了 Grok 追求真理的能力。
Since the initial release of Grok 1, we have iterated rapidly, releasing Grok 2, Grok 3, and, the current version, Grok 4, each delivering material improvements in pre-training, reasoning depth, multimodal capabilities, latency, and scale. Building on this trajectory, we expect to continue scaling Grok through subsequent generations. Ongoing training of next‑generation models is expected to scale toward multiple trillions of parameters, which could represent a step change in reasoning in depth and overall intelligence. In this context, the number of parameters refers to the scale of the model, where parameters are the internal numerical values, such as "weights," that are adjusted during training to enable the model to recognize patterns and relationships in data. A larger number of parameters generally allows the model to capture more complex relationships, store greater amounts of knowledge, and achieve higher levels of reasoning capability. Our accelerated development cadence positions Grok among the fastest-advancing frontier models relative to peers, including OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google. Grok is differentiated by its emphasis on real-time data integration, particularly through insights derived from the X platform (subject to some limitations for certain content), enabling dynamic awareness of current events and user discourse, as well as by explicit investment in reasoning transparency and explainability. Grok enhances the X ecosystem by improving content understanding, personalization, and recommendation systems, thereby increasing user engagement and platform intelligence. We are currently developing next-generation iterations, including Grok 5, which are expected to further expand reasoning fidelity, multimodal integration, and domain-specific performance.
自首次发布 Grok 1 以来，我们快速迭代，发布了 Grok 2、Grok 3 和当前版本 Grok 4，每一代都在预训练、推理深度、多模态能力、延迟和规模上带来显著改进。在这一轨迹基础上，我们预计将继续通过后续几代扩展 Grok。下一代模型的持续训练预计将扩展到数万亿参数，可能代表推理深度和整体智能上的跃迁。此处所说参数数量指模型规模——参数是训练期间被调整的内部数值（如「权重」），使模型能识别数据中的模式和关系。参数数量更大通常使模型能捕捉更复杂的关系、储存更多知识，并达到更高的推理能力水平。我们加速的研发节奏让 Grok 相对同行（包括 OpenAI、Anthropic 和 Google）成为推进最快的前沿模型之一。Grok 的差异化体现在其对实时数据整合的强调上，特别是通过 X 平台获得的洞察（某些内容受一定限制），实现对时事和用户讨论的动态感知；以及在推理透明度和可解释性上的明确投入。Grok 通过改进内容理解、个性化和推荐系统增强 X 生态系统，从而提升用户参与度和平台智能水平。我们目前正在开发下一代版本，包括 Grok 5，预计将进一步扩展推理保真度、多模态整合和领域专属性能。
Terrestrial AI Compute Our terrestrial AI compute forms the backbone of the Grok model family and is anchored by the COLOSSUS and COLOSSUS II data centers that boast some of the world's largest and most advanced AI training clusters.
地面 AI 算力 我们的地面 AI 算力构成 Grok 模型家族的骨干，由 COLOSSUS 和 COLOSSUS II 数据中心承担——这些数据中心拥有全球最大、最先进的 AI 训练集群之一。
COLOSSUS and COLOSSUS II collectively provide approximately 1.0 gigawatt of compute power, with the additional power capacity available for data center operations. We brought the first cluster of COLOSSUS online in 122 days, repurposing the shell of an existing factory, and the first cluster of COLOSSUS II online even faster in 91 days. As an illustrative comparison, an industry benchmark to bring online a 100 megawatt greenfield data center is approximately two years. We also demonstrated a significant improvement in cost efficiency, achieving data center construction costs for COLOSSUS II that are considerably lower than industry benchmarks on a per megawatt basis.
COLOSSUS 和 COLOSSUS II 合计提供约 1.0 吉瓦的算力，另有可用于数据中心运营的额外电力容量。我们用 122 天就让 COLOSSUS 的首个集群上线，改造了一座现有工厂的外壳；COLOSSUS II 首个集群上线则更快，仅 91 天。作为参照，行业基准下让一座 100 兆瓦的全新数据中心上线约需两年。我们在成本效率上也展现了显著进步，COLOSSUS II 的数据中心建设成本按每兆瓦计算大幅低于行业基准。
COLOSSUS II is capable of operating entirely by our self-built behind-the-meter gigawatt-scale natural gas power plant. Our data centers are integrated with the world's largest Megapack deployment, providing additional layers of reliability and operating performance. At all our existing data centers we have employed a brownfield retrofit strategy leveraging existing industrial sites, advanced direct-to-chip cooling to support higher rack densities, and high-speed networking. The clusters deploy leading-edge GPUs to maximize training throughput and model performance. The next phase of expansion at COLOSSUS II is designed to train our next-generation Grok 5 AI model. As we continue to expand our AI compute infrastructure, we will also continue to enhance our power capabilities utilizing a combination of grid-power and behind-the-meter natural gas power plant buildouts. At COLOSSUS, our grid power capabilities are designed to purchase power from the grid as available, and to rely on our behind-the-meter, self-generated power and Megapack installations when grid power is curtailed.
COLOSSUS II 能完全由我们自建的表后 gigawatt 级天然气电厂运行。我们的数据中心与全球最大规模的 Megapack 部署整合，提供额外的可靠性和运营性能层。在我们所有现有数据中心，我们都采用棕地翻新策略，利用现有工业站点、支持更高机柜密度的先进直接到芯片冷却以及高速组网。集群部署最尖端 GPU 以最大化训练吞吐和模型性能。COLOSSUS II 下一阶段扩张被设计为训练我们下一代的 Grok 5 AI 模型。在我们持续扩展 AI 算力基础设施的同时，我们也将继续通过电网电力与表后天然气电厂的组合增强电力能力。在 COLOSSUS，我们的电网电力能力被设计为在可用时从电网采购电力，并在电网电力被削减时依赖我们的表后自发电力和 Megapack 装置。
COLOSSUS II Facility X Platform X is a real-time information, entertainment, and free speech platform that serves as a foundational distribution and data engine for our AI ecosystem. With a global user base generating substantial volumes of content at all times across a wide variety of topics, X provides a uniquely dynamic data for model training and real-time context integration, subject to some limitations for certain content, which significantly differentiates Grok from the other frontier lab offerings.
COLOSSUS II 设施 X 平台 X 是一个实时信息、娱乐和言论自由平台，是我们 AI 生态系统的基础分发与数据引擎。X 拥有时刻产生大量跨多种话题内容的全球用户基础，为模型训练和实时上下文整合提供了独特、动态的数据（某些内容受一定限制），这显著把 Grok 与其他前沿实验室的产品区分开来。
X is Our Real-time Information, Entertainment, and Free Speech Platform X is our real-time information, entertainment, and free speech platform that serves as a global town square with integrated AI capabilities powered by Grok. Designed to evolve toward an "everything app," X enables users to post content, share media, engage in conversations, host, view, and participate in live group discussions, follow real-time events, use encrypted messaging, and leverage advanced features such as Grok-assisted post creation, content discovery, and conversational AI directly within the interface via the prominent Grok icon.
X 是我们的实时信息、娱乐和言论自由平台 X 是我们的实时信息、娱乐和言论自由平台，作为全球城市广场，并通过 Grok 驱动整合 AI 能力。X 被设计为向「万事 App」演进，让用户能发帖、分享媒体、参与对话、主持、观看并参与现场群组讨论、关注实时事件、使用加密消息，并通过界面中显眼的 Grok 图标利用 Grok 辅助创作帖子、发现内容和会话 AI 等高级功能。
Grok Holds Front and Center Real Estate on the X Platform With native integration of Grok's frontier models, including real-time access to X data for up-to-date insights, trending analysis, and enhanced search, X delivers personalized feeds, smarter recommendations, and low-latency AI assistance for our users worldwide. Our X Premium subscription options, including Basic, Premium and Premium+ tiers, offer expanded features, ad-reduced experiences, and priority Grok interactions. In 2023, Grok's chat functionality was integrated into the X app allowing for the user to open the chat interface to type prompts and get real time answers.
Grok 占据 X 平台正中显要位置 通过原生集成 Grok 的前沿模型——包括对 X 数据的实时访问以获得最新洞察、热门分析和增强搜索——X 为全球用户提供个性化信息流、更智能的推荐和低延迟 AI 辅助。我们的 X Premium 订阅选项（Basic、Premium 和 Premium+ 等级）提供更多功能、减少广告的体验以及优先级 Grok 互动。2023 年，Grok 的聊天功能被集成进 X 应用，使用户能打开聊天界面输入提示并获得实时回答。
Public X data enhances Grok's training and reasoning capabilities, while the platform continues to deliver measurable performance outcomes for advertisers, with an increasing strategic focus on performance-based marketing solutions.
公开的 X 数据增强了 Grok 的训练和推理能力，同时平台为广告主继续交付可衡量的效果，对效果型营销方案的战略关注度也在不断提升。
In addition to X consumer products, X offers advertisers and developers a powerful suite of tools to reach highly engaged audiences. Advertisers can target audiences through diverse ad formats--such as Promoted Ads, Vertical Video Ads, Collection Ads, and premium options such as X Amplify and Takeovers--blending seamlessly with organic content for authentic engagement. With advanced targeting based on public conversations, events, keywords, interests, locations, and look-alike audiences, brands can connect with audiences while benefiting from flexible, performance-based pricing (pay only for actions such as clicks or engagements) and often lower costs compared to other platforms. We expect that our ongoing innovations--including Grok-powered integrations, new contextual ad tests, and expanded aspect ratio support for easy reuse of ad creative--make X a competitive choice for driving traffic, conversions, and brand awareness and visibility among X's hundreds of millions of MAUs.
除了 X 消费者产品外，X 为广告主和开发者提供一套强大工具来触达高度互动的受众。广告主可以通过多种广告形式定向受众——例如 Promoted Ads、Vertical Video Ads、Collection Ads 以及 X Amplify 和 Takeovers 等高级选项——与有机内容无缝混合以获得真实互动。借助基于公开对话、事件、关键词、兴趣、位置和相似受众的高级定向，品牌可以在与受众建立连接的同时享受灵活的、基于效果的定价（仅按点击或互动等行为付费），且通常成本低于其他平台。我们预计持续的创新——包括 Grok 驱动的整合、新的情境广告测试以及对宽高比的扩展支持以便广告创意便捷复用——将让 X 成为在 X 数亿月活用户中推动流量、转化以及品牌知名度和可见度的有竞争力选择。
Developers have access to a continuous, high-volume, real-time stream of data around current events, trends, or sentiment, which they can access through an official X Developer Platform and APIs.
开发者可通过官方 X Developer Platform 和 API 获得一个持续、高量、实时的时事、趋势或情绪数据流。
In April 2026, we began a phased roll-out of our new advertising platform, that we rebuilt from the ground up. The new Ads Manager is built to help advertisers launch better campaigns, faster, with stronger ROI. Powered by AI, the new systems enable more precise, relevant and dynamic ad delivery. Ads are seamlessly integrated into a User's X feed.
2026 年 4 月，我们开始分阶段推出从头重建的新广告平台。新版 Ads Manager 旨在帮助广告主以更强的 ROI 更快推出更好的广告活动。由 AI 驱动，新系统实现更精准、相关和动态的广告投放。广告无缝整合进用户的 X 信息流中。
By combining high-volume user interactions with frontier AI, AI compute infrastructure, and vertical integration, X accelerates progress toward ubiquitous connectivity, real-time global awareness, and the foundational social layer for multiplanetary human endeavors.
通过把高频用户互动与前沿 AI、AI 算力基础设施和垂直整合相结合，X 加速了朝普遍连接、实时全球感知以及跨行星人类事业基础社交层的进程。
X Ads Manager. X provides a comprehensive suite of advertising products, including promoted posts, video ads, carousels, and sponsored content, which enable businesses to reach targeted audiences in real time across the platform. Powered by real-time conversation data, interest-based targeting, and behavioral signals, these solutions support objective-based campaigns focused on website traffic, video views, app installs, lead generation, and brand awareness. X's Ad Manager provides a centralized platform that allows advertisers to manage creation, optimization, and real-time monitoring of ad campaigns with detailed audience insights, bidding controls, performance analytics, and A/B testing capabilities. Integration with Grok AI further streamlines creative development, making X's scalable ad solutions effective for businesses of all sizes seeking efficient engagement in a dynamic public conversation environment.
X Ads Manager。X 提供一整套广告产品，包括推广帖子、视频广告、轮播和赞助内容，使企业能跨平台实时触达定向受众。由实时对话数据、基于兴趣的定向和行为信号驱动，这些方案支持以网站流量、视频观看、应用安装、潜在客户挖掘和品牌知名度为目标的活动。X 的 Ads Manager 提供集中平台，让广告主通过详细受众洞察、出价控制、性能分析和 A/B 测试能力管理广告活动的创建、优化和实时监控。与 Grok AI 的整合进一步简化创意开发，使 X 可扩展的广告解决方案对希望在动态公共对话环境中高效互动的各种规模企业都行之有效。
Grok Consumer Products Our consumer products are powered by Grok, including Grok language and coding models, Grok image and video generation models (more commonly known as Grok Imagine), and Grokipedia. These applications leverage the underlying Grok model family to deliver advanced multimodal interaction, real-time information awareness, and transparent reasoning outputs. We currently offer three different tiers of subscription for Grok--basic, SuperGrok, SuperGrok Heavy, and SuperGrok Lite, each priced on a monthly or annual basis. Higher pricing tiers unlock expanded access to advanced models, increased usage limits, priority compute, and a suite of premium features tailored to power users and enterprise-grade applications.
Grok 消费者产品 我们的消费者产品由 Grok 驱动，包括 Grok 语言和编码模型、Grok 图像与视频生成模型（更常被称为 Grok Imagine）和 Grokipedia。这些应用利用底层 Grok 模型家族提供先进的多模态交互、实时信息感知和透明推理输出。我们目前为 Grok 提供四种不同订阅层级——basic、SuperGrok、SuperGrok Heavy 和 SuperGrok Lite，按月或按年定价。更高的定价层级解锁对先进模型的扩展访问、更高的使用上限、优先算力，以及为高级用户和企业级应用量身定制的一套高级功能。
Grok Chat. Grok Chat represents the primary conversational interface of Grok, enabling users to submit text or voice queries for explanations, problem-solving, research, coding, brainstorming, and in-depth discussions with real- time integration of web search, X data, code execution, and multimodal analysis of images or documents. Available via grok.com, dedicated mobile apps, X platform integration, and the xAI API, it provides truth-seeking, helpful, and minimally censored responses optimized for factual precision and complex reasoning.
Grok Chat。Grok Chat 是 Grok 的主要对话界面，允许用户提交文字或语音查询以获得解释、问题解决、研究、编码、头脑风暴和深入讨论——并实时整合网页搜索、X 数据、代码执行以及对图像或文档的多模态分析。可通过 grok.com、专用移动应用、X 平台集成和 xAI API 访问，提供追求真理、有用且最小化审查的回答，针对事实精度和复杂推理进行优化。
Grok Chat Grok Imagine. Grok Imagine is Grok's generative visual and multimedia creation suite, powered by proprietary models for producing high-quality images, short videos (up to 15 seconds at 720p in current iterations), and synchronized audio from text prompts, reference images, or existing visuals. It supports text-to-image/video editing, image-to-video editing, and video-to-video editing, style transfer, and cinematic motion with strong prompt adherence and photorealistic output, accessible through the Grok platform, Imagine tab, and dedicated API.
Grok Chat Grok Imagine。Grok Imagine 是 Grok 的生成式视觉和多媒体创作套件，由自研模型驱动，从文本提示、参考图像或现有视觉生成高质量图像、短视频（当前版本为最长 15 秒 720p）和同步音频。它支持文本到图像/视频编辑、图像到视频编辑、视频到视频编辑、风格迁移和具有强提示遵循性与照片级真实输出的电影级运动，可通过 Grok 平台、Imagine 选项卡和专用 API 访问。
Grok Imagine Grok Voice. Grok Voice delivers natural, real-time conversational AI through voice interactions, allowing users to seamlessly speak and listen to Grok for faster access to information and task execution.
Grok Imagine Grok Voice。Grok Voice 通过语音交互提供自然、实时的会话 AI，使用户能够无缝地与 Grok 进行说与听，更快获取信息和执行任务。
Grok Enterprise Products Grok Teams. Grok Teams empowers small-to-medium-sized organizations to integrate Grok's advanced AI capabilities directly into collaborative workflows. Teams gain access to dedicated workspaces with secure sharing, enhanced privacy protections, and administrative controls for inviting users and managing access. Grok Teams accelerates analysis, innovation, and creation while ensuring data remains private and is never used for training.
Grok 企业产品 Grok Teams。Grok Teams 让中小型组织能把 Grok 的先进 AI 能力直接整合到协作工作流中。团队可获取具有安全共享、增强隐私保护以及邀请用户和管理访问权限的管理控制的专用工作区。Grok Teams 加速分析、创新和创作，同时确保数据保持私有且永不用于训练。
Grok API. The Grok API provides programmatic access to Grok's frontier models, including advanced reasoning, vision, tool-use, image generation, voice AI, and real-time search capabilities, tailored for enterprise-scale integration. It offers features like agentic workflows, and enterprise-grade options such as custom allocations, secure authentication, and dedicated support. Designed for developers and organizations building production applications, the API enables seamless embedding of Grok's powerful AI into custom solutions, driving innovation across industries with speed, precision, and reliability. For example, the enterprise version of the Grok Voice Agent API allows developers and businesses to build multilingual voice agents capable of speech recognition, tool calling, real- time data querying, and low-latency responses. It supports production-grade voice applications that enhance customer service, internal operations, and interactive experiences with high performance in audio reasoning benchmarks.
Grok API。Grok API 提供对 Grok 前沿模型的程序化访问，包括高级推理、视觉、工具使用、图像生成、语音 AI 和实时搜索能力，专为企业级整合定制。它提供如 agentic 工作流的功能，以及定制配额、安全认证和专属支持等企业级选项。该 API 为构建生产级应用的开发者和组织设计，让 Grok 强大的 AI 能无缝嵌入定制方案，以速度、精度和可靠性推动各行业创新。例如，Grok Voice Agent API 的企业版让开发者和企业能构建多语言语音 agent，具备语音识别、工具调用、实时数据查询和低延迟响应。它支持生产级语音应用，在音频推理基准上以高性能增强客户服务、内部运营和交互体验。
Infrastructure and Facilities SpaceX maintains a highly vertically integrated, geographically diverse manufacturing ecosystem that designs, produces, and qualifies a significant share of components in-house, from raw materials and rocket engines to complete launch vehicles, crewed spacecraft, satellites, and user terminals, enabling unprecedented iteration speed, quality control, and cost efficiency essential for successful production of reusable systems and high-cadence operations. Our manufacturing facilities are complemented by our physical infrastructure, which supports launch and orbital operations for human spaceflight, satellite deployment, and cargo missions, as well as large-scale artificial intelligence training and inference. We continue to invest in expansions and improvements across our sites to accommodate anticipated growth in launch cadence, Starlink Subscribers, and AI compute requirements.
基础设施与设施 SpaceX 维持着一个高度垂直整合、地理多样的制造生态系统，在内部设计、生产和验证大量组件——从原材料和火箭引擎到完整的发射载具、载人航天器、卫星和用户终端——使前所未有的迭代速度、质量控制和成本效率成为可能，这对可重复使用系统的成功生产和高频次运营至关重要。我们的制造设施由物理基础设施补充，支持载人航天、卫星部署和货运任务的发射与轨道运营，以及大规模人工智能训练和推理。我们继续投资扩张和改进各地点，以容纳预期的发射频率增长、Starlink 订阅用户增长和 AI 算力需求。
SpaceX Facilities While none of our properties are individually material to our operations because of the long-term timetables for renewal and the opportunities for alternative sites, we maintain an effective network of vertically integrated facilities across the United States, including:
SpaceX 设施 虽然由于续约的长期时间表和替代地点的机会，我们的任何单项资产对运营来说都不是单独重要的，我们在美国境内维持一张高效、垂直整合的设施网络，包括：
•Starbase, Texas: Development, manufacturing, testing, and launch of Starship currently takes place at Starbase, home to SpaceX headquarters and one of the world's first commercial spaceports designed for orbital missions. The site is located at the newly created city of Starbase in Cameron County, Texas, along the Gulf of America. Its infrastructure includes Starfactory, a manufacturing facility designed to mass produce Starship and Super Heavy at scale; a large office structure co-locating engineering and production personnel; and large, vertical integration buildings including the upcoming Gigabay, which will be able to support Starship and Super Heavy vehicles up to 85 meters (279 feet) tall and will provide 24 work cells for integration and refurbishment work, along with cranes capable of lifting up to 400 tons. Starbase also has an orbital launch pad for flight of the world's most powerful rocket, complete with one of the tallest launch towers in the world, specially designed to integrate, test, launch, and catch Starship and Super Heavy vehicles, with an additional pad underway to support Starship V3. The Starbase team also operates a site for full and subscale vehicle structural testing, static fires, and component level testing.
• 德州 Starbase：Starship 的研发、制造、测试和发射目前在 Starbase 进行——这里是 SpaceX 总部所在地，也是世界首批为轨道任务设计的商业航天港之一。该站点位于德州 Cameron 县 Gulf of America 沿岸新建的 Starbase 市。其基础设施包括 Starfactory（一个被设计用于大规模量产 Starship 和 Super Heavy 的制造设施）、把工程和生产人员共置的大型办公楼，以及包括即将建成的 Gigabay 在内的大型垂直整合楼——Gigabay 将能支持高达 85 米 (279 英尺) 的 Starship 和 Super Heavy 载具，并提供 24 个用于整合和翻新工作的工作单元，以及最大可吊起 400 吨的吊车。Starbase 还有用于发射全球最强大火箭飞行的轨道发射台，配备世界最高的发射塔之一——专门设计用于整合、测试、发射和抓回 Starship 与 Super Heavy 载具——另有一个正在建设中的发射台以支持 Starship V3。Starbase 团队还运营着一个用于全尺寸和子尺寸载具结构测试、静态点火和部件级测试的站点。
Starbase is also home to several hundred SpaceX employees and their families, many of whom have relocated from across the country to the community to support the development and operation of Starship. SpaceX, in partnership with the newly formed city, is developing local infrastructure and municipal services, including utilities, governance, schools, and environmental conservation initiatives, to support a world-class, concentrated engineering and manufacturing community focused on the rapid advancement of Starship and SpaceX's long- term mission. This close integration of residential life, engineering, and manufacturing around a single program enables a mission-focused environment designed to accelerate development, testing, and launch operations.
Starbase 也是数百名 SpaceX 员工及其家属的家园，其中许多人从全国各地迁居至此，支援 Starship 的开发和运营。SpaceX 与新成立的市政府合作，正在开发本地基础设施和市政服务，包括水电、治理、学校和环境保护倡议，以支持一个聚焦于 Starship 与 SpaceX 长期使命快速推进的世界级、集中式工程与制造社区。这种围绕单一项目把居住生活、工程和制造紧密整合的方式形成了使命聚焦的环境，旨在加速研发、测试和发射运营。
SpaceX Headquarters at Starbase, Texas •Hawthorne, California: Our original flagship facility in Hawthorne, California manufactures Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy first and second stages, Dragon Crew and Dragon Cargo spacecraft, Merlin engines, Starship's Raptor engines, Starlink User Terminals, as well as other various Starship components. The site supports high- reliability production for hundreds of successful missions, including NASA-certified crew rotations. We also maintain a corporate presence in Hawthorne.
德州 Starbase 的 SpaceX 总部 • 加州 Hawthorne：我们在加州 Hawthorne 的原始旗舰设施制造 Falcon 9 和 Falcon Heavy 的一级与二级、Dragon 载人和 Dragon 货运航天器、Merlin 引擎、Starship 的 Raptor 引擎、Starlink 用户终端及各种 Starship 组件。该站点支持数百次成功任务的高可靠性生产，包括 NASA 认证的机组轮换。我们在 Hawthorne 也保留公司办公存在。
Hawthorne, California •McGregor, Texas: The McGregor rocket engine complex is the most active rocket development and testing facility in the world. It serves as the primary site for qualification, acceptance, and post-flight testing of Merlin and Raptor engines. It features 15 specialized test stands, including dedicated vertical stands for Raptor engines and multiple stands for Falcon 9's Merlin engines, as well as component-level testing facilities for Starship hardware, including composite overwrapped pressure vessels, tanks, and experimental systems.
加州 Hawthorne • 德州 McGregor：McGregor 火箭引擎综合设施是世界上最活跃的火箭研发和测试设施。它作为 Merlin 和 Raptor 引擎的认证、验收和飞后测试的主要站点。它配备 15 个专用测试台，包括用于 Raptor 引擎的专用垂直测试台和用于 Falcon 9 Merlin 引擎的多个测试台，以及用于 Starship 硬件的部件级测试设施（包括复合材料缠绕压力容器、贮箱和实验系统）。
McGregor, Texas •Redmond, Washington: The Redmond Starlink satellite manufacturing facility has produced an average of approximately 70 satellites per week (approximately 3,640 per year at full rate) from December 2025 to April 2026, covering bus structures, phased-array antennas, propulsion, solar arrays, and inter-satellite lasers, enabling rapid Starlink constellation expansion.
德州 McGregor • 华盛顿 Redmond：Redmond Starlink 卫星制造设施在 2025 年 12 月至 2026 年 4 月期间平均每周生产约 70 颗卫星（按满产计算约每年 3,640 颗），覆盖卫星平台结构、相控阵天线、推进、太阳能阵列和星间激光，支撑 Starlink 星座的快速扩张。
Redmond, Washington •Bastrop, Texas: We build the majority of Starlink products at our manufacturing facility in Bastrop, Texas, which opened in 2023, producing tens of thousands of Starlink Kits per day and all of the current generation Starlink Standard and Performance Kits.
华盛顿 Redmond • 德州 Bastrop：我们在 2023 年开业的德州 Bastrop 制造设施生产大部分 Starlink 产品，每天生产数万套 Starlink Kits，以及目前所有现行代 Starlink Standard 和 Performance Kits。
In 2026, we expect to more than double the size of the Bastrop facility, expanding our design and manufacturing capabilities to support new Starlink products, plus deepening our vertical integration by adding the production of Starlink gateway antennas, solar cells and AI compute satellites.
2026 年，我们预计将把 Bastrop 设施规模扩大一倍以上，扩展设计与制造能力以支持新的 Starlink 产品，并通过新增 Starlink 网关天线、太阳能电池和 AI 算力卫星的生产，深化垂直整合。
Bastrop, Texas •Kennedy Space Center and Cape Canaveral, Florida: SpaceX operations in Florida span across NASA's Kennedy Space Center and Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, which includes two active launch sites-- Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) and Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40)--Falcon booster and Dragon spacecraft refurbishing facilities, launch operations, and payload processing buildings. Both launch sites support critical missions to geostationary orbit and the International Space Station while also providing launch opportunities to a wide range of low, mid, and polar orbit inclinations for science and national security missions. SpaceX also utilizes Landing Zones 40 and 2 at the Cape, which support Return to Launch Site landings for Falcon boosters ahead of recovery and refurbishment for future missions.
德州 Bastrop • 佛州 Kennedy 航天中心与 Cape Canaveral：SpaceX 在佛州的运营横跨 NASA 的 Kennedy 航天中心和 Cape Canaveral Space Force Station，包括两个在役发射场——Launch Complex 39A (LC-39A) 和 Space Launch Complex 40 (SLC-40)——Falcon 助推器和 Dragon 航天器翻新设施、发射运营和载荷处理楼。两个发射场都支持飞往地球同步轨道和国际空间站的关键任务，同时还为科学和国家安全任务提供广泛的低、中、极地轨道倾角发射机会。SpaceX 还利用 Cape 的 Landing Zones 40 和 2 来支持 Falcon 助推器的发射场返回着陆，以备未来任务的回收和翻新。
Once recovered, flight hardware is refurbished at one of two state-of-the-art SpaceX facilities, HangarX and X2, on Kennedy Space Center. These facilities also house our Falcon Launch and Landing Control Center, where our Dragon spacecraft are refurbished and prepared for their next missions after they are recovered off the coast of southern California, where we produce Starship heatshield tiles in the Bakery, and where we process customer payloads before launch in our Payload Processing Facility.
回收后，飞行硬件在 Kennedy 航天中心两座最先进的 SpaceX 设施 HangarX 和 X2 之一进行翻新。这些设施还容纳我们的 Falcon 发射与着陆控制中心，在那里我们的 Dragon 航天器在加州南部海岸被打捞后会被翻新并准备下次任务；我们在 Bakery 生产 Starship 隔热瓦；我们在 Payload Processing Facility 中在发射前处理客户载荷。
For future launches, SpaceX is expanding its operations in Florida to bring Starship to the Cape. In addition to the under-construction Starship launch pad at LC-39A expected to be completed by the end of 2026, SpaceX is constructing Space Launch Complex 37 (SLC-37) on Cape Canaveral Space Force Station as another Starship launch site. SLC-37 will host two orbital launch pads, including up to two towers for Starship launch, catch, and testing operations, culminating in a total of four operational launch pads for Starship by the end of 2027.
为未来发射，SpaceX 正在扩大其在佛州的运营以将 Starship 引入 Cape。除了 LC-39A 上预计 2026 年底完工的在建 Starship 发射台外，SpaceX 还在 Cape Canaveral Space Force Station 上建造 Space Launch Complex 37 (SLC-37) 作为另一处 Starship 发射场。SLC-37 将设有两座轨道发射台，包括最多两座用于 Starship 发射、抓回和测试运营的发射塔，到 2027 年底将合计形成四座 Starship 在用发射台。
SpaceX is also building a new integration facility called Gigabay, next to its HangarX location at Kennedy Space Center by late 2026.
SpaceX 还在 Kennedy 航天中心 HangarX 旁边建造一座名为 Gigabay 的新整合设施，预计 2026 年底建成。
In connection with preparing leased real property for our launch operations, we make significant capital improvements and install extensive real and personal property at these government-owned sites. The launch facilities we build are a unique capital improvement compared to standard commercial use sites because the federal government specifically designates these launch sites for aerospace activities, such as rocket launches.
在为我们的发射运营准备租赁的不动产时，我们在这些政府所有的站点上进行了大量资本改良并安装了大量不动产和动产。我们建造的发射设施与标准商业用地相比是独特的资本改良，因为联邦政府专门把这些发射场指定用于航空航天活动，如火箭发射。
Given the specific use requirements of these government-owned sites, we have historically entered into handover agreements with the relevant government entities upon expiration or termination of the leases, pursuant to which the improvements are transferred to the government rather than removed. This fact pattern has historically been the case with previous leases such as at Cape Canaveral Space Force Station.
鉴于这些政府所有站点的特定使用要求，我们历史上在租约到期或终止时与相关政府实体签订交接协议，协议规定改良物转让给政府而非拆除。这一情况在 Cape Canaveral Space Force Station 等过往租约中已是惯例。
NASA's Kennedy Space Center, Florida Cape Canaveral Space Force Station, Florida •Vandenberg Space Force Base, Space Launch Complex 4: Space Launch Complex 4 East at Vandenberg Space Force Base is our West Coast launch site and serves as our primary facility for polar and high-inclination orbit missions critical to Starlink constellation deployment, national security payloads, Earth observation satellites, and select lunar trajectories. The facility includes a modernized orbital launch pad optimized for Falcon 9 launches, featuring a fixed launch mount, integration tower, propellant loading infrastructure, flame trench, and support systems enabling frequent operations. Adjacent Space Launch Complex 4 West functions as a dedicated Falcon 9 booster landing zone, supporting downrange recoveries to maximize reusability. Please refer to "--Kennedy Space Center and Cape Canaveral, Florida" for additional information regarding our lease arrangements with government entities.
NASA 佛州 Kennedy 航天中心 佛州 Cape Canaveral Space Force Station • Vandenberg Space Force Base，Space Launch Complex 4：Vandenberg Space Force Base 的 Space Launch Complex 4 East 是我们的西海岸发射场，并作为我们用于 Starlink 星座部署、国家安全载荷、地球观测卫星和选定月球轨迹至关重要的极地和高倾角轨道任务的主要设施。该设施包括为 Falcon 9 发射优化的现代化轨道发射台，配备固定发射支架、整合塔、推进剂加注基础设施、火焰沟和支持频繁运营的辅助系统。相邻的 Space Launch Complex 4 West 作为专用 Falcon 9 助推器着陆区，支持下程回收以最大化可重复使用。关于我们与政府实体的租赁安排，请参阅「——佛州 Kennedy 航天中心与 Cape Canaveral」获取更多信息。
Vandenberg Space Force Base, California •Memphis, Tennessee and Southaven, Mississippi: We operate a cluster of high-density data centers in the Greater Memphis Area extending into northern Mississippi along the state border, to power training and inference for frontier AI models, including the Grok family. The flagship COLOSSUS supercomputer campus is located on Paul R. Lowry Road in Memphis, Tennessee; the COLOSSUS II facilities are located on Tulane Road in Memphis, Tennessee and on Stateline Road in Southaven, Mississippi.
加州 Vandenberg Space Force Base • 田纳西州 Memphis 与密西西比州 Southaven：我们在大 Memphis 地区运营一组高密度数据中心，沿州界延伸至密西西比北部，为前沿 AI 模型（包括 Grok 系列）提供训练和推理算力。旗舰 COLOSSUS 超级计算机园区位于田纳西州 Memphis 的 Paul R. Lowry Road；COLOSSUS II 设施位于田纳西州 Memphis 的 Tulane Road 和密西西比州 Southaven 的 Stateline Road。
Memphis, Tennessee •Palo Alto, California: The corporate headquarters for our AI operations following the acquisition of xAI in February 2026 is located in Palo Alto, California. This location, under long-term lease, houses our advanced AI research, development, and engineering teams and is strategically situated in Silicon Valley to attract and retain top AI research talent. The engineers responsible for the design, training, and continued evolution of Grok, our proprietary frontier AI model, are based at this facility.
田纳西州 Memphis • 加州 Palo Alto：2026 年 2 月收购 xAI 后，我们 AI 运营的公司总部位于加州 Palo Alto。该地点为长期租赁，容纳我们的先进 AI 研究、研发和工程团队，战略性地位于 Silicon Valley 以吸引并留住顶级 AI 研究人才。负责自研前沿 AI 模型 Grok 的设计、训练和持续演进的工程师就位于此设施。
Palo Alto, California In addition to our infrastructure and facilities across the United States, we also operate a fleet of recovery vessels, autonomous spaceport drone ships ("ASDS"), and a network of Starlink ground stations.
加州 Palo Alto 除了我们在美国境内的基础设施和设施之外，我们还运营一支回收船队、自主航天港无人船（ASDS）以及一张 Starlink 地面站网络。
•Our recovery fleet: Our fleet of ASDS forms the maritime backbone of SpaceX's reusable rocket architecture, enabling high-probability downrange booster landings for Falcon 9 and Falcon Heavy missions while maximizing vehicle recovery and rapid refurbishment. The core ASDS fleet consists of three operational vessels: "Of Course I Still Love You," the pioneering East Coast-to-Pacific vessel homeported at the Port of Long Beach, California, and dedicated to supporting primarily polar and high-inclination launches from Vandenberg Space Force Base with its large landing deck and thruster-based dynamic positioning; "Just Read the Instructions," stationed at Port Canaveral, Florida, serving East Coast operations from Cape Canaveral and Kennedy Space Center; and "A Shortfall of Gravitas," the newest and most advanced addition since 2021, also based at Port Canaveral with enhanced autonomy, station-keeping precision, and upgraded deck infrastructure to handle frequent, high-cadence missions. These autonomous ships have collectively facilitated hundreds of successful booster touchdowns, dramatically reducing expendable flight profiles and enabling the reuse of boosters 34 times as of March 31, 2026. Complementing the drone ships are dedicated support vessels for fairing half recovery, such as "Bob" and "Doug," named after astronauts Bob Behnken and Doug Hurley, and Dragon retrieval vessel "Shannon," named in honor of astronaut Shannon Walker. These support vessels ensure comprehensive ocean-based recovery operations across Atlantic and Pacific theaters and underpin our constellation deployments, national security launches, and crewed missions while advancing toward full reusability for Starship in future offshore scenarios.
• 我们的回收船队：我们的 ASDS 船队构成 SpaceX 可重复使用火箭架构的海上骨干，使 Falcon 9 和 Falcon Heavy 任务的下程助推器高概率着陆成为可能，同时最大化载具回收和快速翻新。核心 ASDS 船队包含三艘运营船：「Of Course I Still Love You」——首创的东海岸到太平洋船只，母港在加州长滩港，以其大着陆甲板和基于推进器的动态定位主要支援 Vandenberg Space Force Base 的极地和高倾角发射；「Just Read the Instructions」——驻泊佛州 Port Canaveral，服务 Cape Canaveral 和 Kennedy 航天中心的东海岸作业；「A Shortfall of Gravitas」——自 2021 年以来新增的、最先进的船只，同样驻泊 Port Canaveral，具有增强的自主性、保位精度和升级的甲板基础设施，以处理频繁、高频次任务。这些自主船只累计完成了数百次成功的助推器降落，大幅减少一次性飞行剖面，并使助推器截至 2026 年 3 月 31 日复飞达 34 次。无人船之外还有专用整流罩半回收船（如以宇航员 Bob Behnken 和 Doug Hurley 命名的「Bob」和「Doug」）以及以宇航员 Shannon Walker 命名的 Dragon 打捞船「Shannon」。这些支援船确保了大西洋和太平洋海域全面的海上回收作业，支撑我们的星座部署、国家安全发射和载人任务，并为未来 Starship 离岸场景的完全可重复使用迈进。
Autonomous Drone Ship "A Shortfall of Gravitas"
自主无人船「A Shortfall of Gravitas」
•Starlink ground stations: A Starlink ground station, also referred to as a gateway, is a terrestrial relay station that communicates with our satellite constellation. These stations transmit data between satellites and terrestrial internet networks. We operate ground stations around the world, with over 400 sites globally.
• Starlink 地面站：Starlink 地面站（也称为网关）是与我们的卫星星座通信的地面中继站。这些站点在卫星与地面互联网网络之间传输数据。我们在全球运营地面站，全球有超过 400 个站点。
Customer Case Studies The following examples illustrate ways in which customers across a range of industries have used and benefited from our solutions within our Space, Connectivity, and AI segments. These examples are intended to highlight representative applications of our offerings and the types of operational, performance and efficiency benefits that customers may realize.
客户案例研究 以下例子展示了各行业客户如何在我们的太空、连接和 AI 板块中使用并受益于我们的方案。这些例子旨在突出我们产品的代表性应用，以及客户可能实现的运营、性能和效率收益类型。
In addition, we include examples of our deployment of Starlink services in response to natural disasters, which demonstrate our ability to rapidly establish communications infrastructure to support emergency response and recovery efforts in challenging environments.
此外，我们包含了我们在响应自然灾害时部署 Starlink 服务的例子，体现了我们能在具有挑战性的环境中快速建立通信基础设施以支援应急响应和恢复工作的能力。
Competition Our principal sources of competition vary based on the segment and market in which our business operates.
竞争 我们的主要竞争来源因业务运营所在的板块和市场而异。
In Space, we compete with launch service providers that transport small, medium, and heavy payloads and astronauts to Earth's orbit and beyond. Participants in this market include established aerospace and defense companies, emerging commercial launch providers, and national space agencies. Key established aerospace and defense competitors providing launch services include, among others, United Launch Alliance, a joint venture between Boeing and Lockheed Martin, Arianespace, a French-based aerospace company operating a family of European-developed rockets, and Northrop Grumman, manufacturer of the Cygnus cargo spacecraft. Emerging commercial launch providers include Blue Origin, which has developed launch vehicles intended to compete with our Falcon 9 rocket, and Rocket Lab, which operates in the small-lift launch market but is expanding into medium- lift payloads, as well as other domestic competitors such as Firefly Aerospace and Relativity Space. While we typically do not compete directly for the same missions, national space agencies also provide launch services in their respective markets.
在太空领域，我们与运送小、中、重型载荷以及宇航员到地球轨道及更远处的发射服务提供商竞争。该市场参与者包括成熟的航空航天与国防公司、新兴商业发射提供商和各国太空机构。提供发射服务的关键成熟航空航天与国防竞争对手包括（但不限于）Boeing 与 Lockheed Martin 合资的 United Launch Alliance、运营欧洲研制火箭家族的法国航天公司 Arianespace，以及 Cygnus 货运航天器制造商 Northrop Grumman。新兴商业发射提供商包括开发了拟与我们 Falcon 9 火箭竞争的发射载具的 Blue Origin、运营在小型发射市场但正扩展进入中型载荷的 Rocket Lab，以及其他国内竞争对手如 Firefly Aerospace 和 Relativity Space。虽然我们通常不直接竞争同一任务，但各国太空机构也在各自市场提供发射服务。
However, the launch services market is characterized by significant barriers to entry, including substantial capital requirements, advanced technological expertise, regulatory licenses and approvals, and established relationships with government and commercial customers. Competition in this market is based on factors that include launch reliability and cadence, payload capacity, mission flexibility, manufacturing capabilities and price. For this reason, while the established aerospace and defense competitors and emerging commercial launch providers may provide launch services at varying degrees of scale, we believe that SpaceX holds a meaningful advantage in terms of the breadth of our launch solutions and services and the cadence at which we are able to launch, and thus a significant competitive advantage relative to these players.
然而，发射服务市场具有显著进入壁垒，包括巨额资本要求、先进技术专长、监管许可与批准以及与政府和商业客户既有的关系。该市场的竞争基于发射可靠性与频次、载荷能力、任务灵活性、制造能力和价格等因素。因此，尽管成熟的航空航天与国防竞争对手和新兴商业发射提供商可在不同规模上提供发射服务，我们相信 SpaceX 在发射方案与服务的广度以及发射频率上拥有显著优势，因而相对这些玩家具有显著的竞争优势。
In Connectivity, we compete with operators of terrestrial and satellite communications infrastructure and providers of satellite-to-mobile connectivity solutions, including terrestrial fixed network providers, terrestrial mobile network companies, and other satellite service providers, as described below:
在连接领域，我们与地面和卫星通信基础设施运营方以及卫星直连移动连接方案提供方竞争，包括地面固网提供方、地面移动网络公司和其他卫星服务提供方，如下所述：
•Consumer and Enterprise Broadband. Our Starlink Consumer and Enterprise broadband offerings compete with terrestrial fixed network providers, terrestrial mobile network companies, and other satellite service providers.
• 消费者与企业宽带。我们的 Starlink 消费者和企业宽带产品与地面固网提供方、地面移动网络公司和其他卫星服务提供方竞争。
Terrestrial fixed network providers include operators of cable and fiber networks such as Verizon, Comcast, AT&T, T-Mobile, Lumen, Charter Communications, Google Fiber, Astound, BT, Deutsche Telekom, and Liberty Global. Terrestrial mobile network companies also operate land-based infrastructure, including wireless antennas affixed to mobile towers used to provide fixed wireless services, and include AT&T, Telefonica, T- Mobile, Verizon, and Vodafone Group. These network providers typically serve customers in one or more countries (for example, Verizon in the United States, or Telefonica in Spain and Brazil, among others), but are not global players insofar as they do not sell to a global customer base, nor does their network infrastructure exist globally. Satellite service providers include, among others, GEO satellite network operators such as EchoStar, SES, Telesat Corporation ("Telesat") GEO, and Viasat, as well as current and planned LEO and MEO constellations including Amazon LEO, Blue Origin's TeraWave, Eutelsat OneWeb, Iridium NEXT and Telesat Lightspeed. Some of these service providers are also launch customers of SpaceX as they contract with us to launch their satellite constellations into orbit.
地面固网提供方包括有线电视和光纤网络运营方，如 Verizon、Comcast、AT&T、T-Mobile、Lumen、Charter Communications、Google Fiber、Astound、BT、Deutsche Telekom 和 Liberty Global。地面移动网络公司也运营基于地面的基础设施，包括用于提供固定无线服务的、安装在移动塔上的无线天线，包括 AT&T、Telefonica、T-Mobile、Verizon 和 Vodafone Group。这些网络提供方通常服务一两个或多个国家的客户（例如 Verizon 在美国，或 Telefonica 在西班牙和巴西等），但并非全球玩家——它们既不向全球客户基础销售，网络基础设施也不存在于全球范围。卫星服务提供方包括（但不限于）GEO 卫星网络运营方（如 EchoStar、SES、Telesat Corporation（「Telesat」）GEO 和 Viasat），以及当前和计划中的 LEO 与 MEO 星座，包括 Amazon LEO、Blue Origin 的 TeraWave、Eutelsat OneWeb、Iridium NEXT 和 Telesat Lightspeed。其中一些服务提供方同时也是 SpaceX 的发射客户——他们与我们签约将其卫星星座发射入轨。
•Government Solutions. Our Starlink broadband offering for government use cases competes primarily with the same terrestrial network providers and satellite service providers with which our Starlink Consumer and Enterprise broadband offerings compete, as well as defense prime contractors. In certain cases, these providers also have dedicated subsidiaries or business units focused on serving government customers, such as Telesat Government Solutions.
• 政府解决方案。我们用于政府用例的 Starlink 宽带产品主要与我们的 Starlink 消费者和企业宽带产品所竞争的相同的地面网络提供方和卫星服务提供方竞争，以及与国防主承包商竞争。在某些情况下，这些提供方还有专门服务政府客户的子公司或业务部门，如 Telesat Government Solutions。
•Starlink Mobile. Our Starlink Mobile offering competes with other satellite-to-mobile satellite operators including, among others, AST SpaceMobile, Lynk, Globalstar and Skylo.
• Starlink Mobile。我们的 Starlink Mobile 产品与其他卫星直连移动卫星运营方竞争，包括（但不限于）AST SpaceMobile、Lynk、Globalstar 和 Skylo。
The satellite connectivity market involves significant barriers to entry, including substantial capital requirements, advanced technological capabilities, access to spectrum and orbital resources, regulatory licenses and approvals, and the development of relationships with government, enterprise and commercial customers. Competition in this market is based on factors that include network coverage, capacity, latency and reliability, spectrum access, density of urban environments, satellite deployment capability and efficiency, price and user acquisition, retention, and experience.
卫星连接市场存在显著进入壁垒，包括巨额资本要求、先进技术能力、获取频谱和轨道资源、监管许可与批准，以及与政府、企业和商业客户关系的建立。该市场的竞争基于网络覆盖、容量、延迟与可靠性、频谱接入、城市环境的密度、卫星部署能力与效率、价格以及用户获取、留存和体验等因素。
In AI, we compete with developers of foundational AI models and providers of AI products and services, as well as general purpose and vertical search engines, information services, online advertising platforms and social networks.
在 AI 领域，我们与基础 AI 模型开发方、AI 产品和服务提供方竞争，同时也与通用搜索引擎和垂直搜索引擎、信息服务、在线广告平台和社交网络竞争。
Participants in this market include large technology companies, emerging AI model developers and providers of AI- enabled products and services. Key competitors in these markets include, among others, AI model developers and platform providers such as OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Meta, Microsoft, and various open source model providers, as well as social networks such as Threads (owned by Meta), Reddit, and TikTok. As we continue to build out our AI compute infrastructure, we intend to sell our excess capacity by offering it to a limited number of third parties and intend to continue to explore monetizing excess capacity, potentially positioning us to emerge as a competitor to AI cloud providers such as Coreweave and Nebius as well as hyperscalers.
该市场参与者包括大型科技公司、新兴 AI 模型开发方以及 AI 赋能产品和服务的提供方。这些市场的关键竞争对手包括（但不限于）AI 模型开发方和平台提供方，如 OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、Meta、Microsoft，以及各类开源模型提供方，还有 Threads（由 Meta 拥有）、Reddit 和 TikTok 等社交网络。在我们继续构建 AI 算力基础设施的同时，我们打算通过向有限数量的第三方提供剩余容量来变现，并计划继续探索剩余容量的变现，可能让我们成为 Coreweave 和 Nebius 等 AI 云提供方以及 hyperscaler 的竞争对手。
Our AI businesses likewise compete in markets characterized by significant barriers to entry, including substantial computational and infrastructure requirements, access to large datasets and the ability to attract and retain highly skilled technical talent. Competition in these markets is based on factors including pricing and cost efficiency, the performance and technical features of AI platforms, customer experience across our products and services, the ability to attract new and retain existing subscribers, users and advertisers and the ability to deploy compute and innovative technologies at scale.
我们的 AI 业务同样在具有显著进入壁垒的市场中竞争，包括巨大的算力和基础设施需求、获取大型数据集的能力以及吸引并留住高技能技术人才的能力。这些市场的竞争基于定价和成本效率、AI 平台的性能与技术特性、跨我们产品和服务的客户体验、吸引新订阅者/用户/广告主并留住现有订阅者/用户/广告主的能力，以及大规模部署算力和创新技术的能力等因素。
Intellectual Property The intellectual property that is material to our business includes our proprietary knowledge and software, as well as our brands and our selectively patented inventions and technologies. Our proprietary knowledge includes expertise in design, testing, manufacturing, software, in-orbit operations, real-time platforms, and artificial intelligence development. The protection of our technology and intellectual property is an important aspect of our business. We rely upon a combination of patents, trademarks, trade secrets, copyrights, confidentiality procedures, contractual commitments and other legal rights to establish and protect our intellectual property. We have registered, and applied for the registration of, U.S. and international trademarks, service marks, domain names, and copyrights. We have also filed patent applications and acquired patents in the United States and foreign countries covering certain aspects of our technology, and in some cases, we have acquired patent assets of others to supplement our portfolio.
